1000687522.english: Yes. This human here is the new Air Squadron Commander of the Sky Knights.
1000687522.korean: 그렇다네. 여기 이 인간님이 스카이 나이츠의 새로운 비행단장님이라네.

1000687523.english: No, damn… introducing them in this situation ruins the moment.
1000687523.korean: 아니, 씨… 이런 상황에서 소개해주면 모양이 안 살잖아.

1000687524.english: Ah, maybe it's because the applause was missing?

1000687526.english: Wow! Yes… looks like a human! Sex… has a nice personality!
1000687526.korean: 와! 예… 사람처럼 생겼다! 섹… 성격 좋게 생겼다!

1000687527.english: It doesn't feel like a compliment at all.

1000687528.english: Well, the personality does look a bit off. Lies get caught quickly, after all.
1000687528.korean: 하긴, 성격 안 좋게 생기긴 했네. 거짓말이라서 금방 탄로나는군.

1000687530.english: Regrettably, the warranty period has expired.

1000687536.english: It's only been a few days since we met.

1000687537.english: Still, you seem really close for that?

1000687538.english: It's just that I was moved by the Air Squadron Commander's kind-hearted, easygoing personality.
1000687538.korean: 비행단장님의 호ㄱ-암가는 성격에 내가 감화된 것이지.

1000687539.english: Feels like you suddenly changed your tone in the middle there.
1000687539.korean: 중간에 말 바꾼 느낌이 팍팍 드는데?

1000687540.english: What do you mean? Look at my face.

1000687541.english: Do I look like I'd notice the Commander's easygoing nature and play around with it?
1000687541.korean: 내가 비행단장님의 호구 같은 성격을 알아보고 멋대로 놀려먹을 것처럼 보이나?

1000687542.english: You just called me "easygoing"! There's no way to take that back now!
1000687542.korean: 너 호구라고 했어! 방금 빼도 박도 못하게 호구라고 했어!

1000687543.english: Hey! I am the Air Squadron Commander! I'm your superior!

1000687544.english: I'm the Commander newly assigned to the Sky Knights.

1000687545.english: As you can see, I'm human, so I won't be flying or fighting with you—just handling administrative duties.
1000687545.korean: 보다시피 인간이라 너희랑 같이 비행이나 전투는 못하고 행정업무만 볼 생각이다.

1000687546.english: Regarding combat, I plan to give you as much autonomy as possible.
1000687546.korean: 전투에 관해서는 너희에게 최대한 자율권을 보장할 생각이지.

1000687547.english: As long as you follow the rules, I won't interfere—keep that in mind.
1000687547.korean: 지킬 것만 잘 지키면 터치가 없을 것이니 이를 염두해도록.

1000687548.english: "Just follow the rules" is the most annoying advice; the scope is way too broad.
1000687548.korean: 지킬 것만 지키라는 말이 제일 귀찮지. 범위가 너무 광범위해서.

1000687549.english: From now on, you're the Squad Leader.

1000687551.english: I'll keep you by my side and manage you directly.

1000687552.english: May I respectfully raise a point?

1000687554.english: On the battlefield, a single order from the commander can often mean life or death.
1000687554.korean: 전장에서는 지휘관의 명령 하나에 목숨이 오가는 일이 빈번합니다.

1000687555.english: If the Air Squadron Commander cannot lead in combat, then the Squad Leader will likely have to take command of us.
1000687555.korean: 비행단장님께서 전투를 지휘하지 못하시면 전대장님이 저희를 지휘하게 될 확률이 높습니다.

1000687556.english: It doesn't seem appropriate to appoint someone to such a position without a valid reason.
1000687556.korean: 그런 자리를 합당한 이유가 없는 자를 임명하는 것은 바람직하지 않아 보입니다.

1000687558.english: I was joking, but there's actually a reason.

1000687559.english: This one may be an insolent old-timer, but…

1000687561.english: You can somewhat understand it just from the fact that they've survived, alternating between real combat and aerial combat instructor duty since the First Allied War, right?
1000687561.korean: 1차 연합전쟁 때부터 지금까지 실전과 공중전 교관을 교대로 수행하면서 살아남았다는 것만으로도 어느 정도 납득할 수 있지 않아?

1000687564.english: Since that one is calm and collected, doesn't that make them more suitable as squad leader?
1000687564.korean: 저 아이가 침착 냉정하니 전대장에 더 어울려 보이지 않나?

1000687565.english: If I see you're useless, I'll replace you.
1000687565.korean: 네가 하는 거 봐서 못 써먹겠다 싶으면 바꾸지.

1000687566.english: And P-49 Sleipnir, this is your first time being deployed in real combat, right?
1000687566.korean: 그리고 슬레이프니르. 너도 이번에 처음으로 실전 배치된 거지?

1000687567.english: Heh~ Even so, no one can keep up with my speed, though.
1000687567.korean: 흐흥~ 그래도 내 속도를 따라올 수 있는 녀석은 없을걸?

1000687568.english: Still, you're not fighting alone, so try to coordinate with the others.
1000687568.korean: 그래도 혼자 싸우는 것은 아니니까 다른 애들이랑 합은 맞춰보고.

1000687569.english: Even if she's a bit rough around the edges, Phaeton also doubles as an aerial combat instructor, so ask her about anything and everything.
1000687569.korean: 썩어도 준치라고 피톤이 공중전 교관도 겸할 테니까 이것저것 많이 물어봐.

1000687570.english: Why does our commander always have to say so much…
1000687570.korean: 우리 단장님은 왜 한 마디가 더 많으신가…

1000687571.english: The sudden restructuring of the unit is going to cause all sorts of confusion.
1000687571.korean: 갑자기 부대가 개편되어서 이래저래 혼란스러울 거야.

1000687573.english: The enemies we're facing are unprecedentedly strong. To face such foes, we need to go through a process to optimize ourselves.
1000687573.korean: 우리가 마주한 적은 전대미문의 강적이야. 이런 적을 상대하기 위해서는 우리들을 최적화하는 과정이 필요하지.

1000687574.english: But humanity has always overcome every hardship, no matter how severe.
1000687574.korean: 하지만 인류는 어떠한 고난을 맞이해도 어떻게든 이겨냈어.

1000687575.english: This time will be no different.

1000687576.english: No matter how the enemy acts, humanity will never lose.
1000687576.korean: 적이 어떠하든. 인류는 결코 지지 않아.

1000687577.english: This is my first time handling commander duties, so it was a bit rough.
1000687577.korean: 지휘관 업무는 거의 처음 해보는 거여서 이래저래 고생 좀 했다네.

1000687578.english: From paperwork to managing the squad members.

1000687579.english: And then what's this? Performing too?

1000687582.english: I got to know the squad members better, after all.
1000687582.korean: 대원들을 더 잘 알 수 있었으니 말일세.

1000687584.english: Indeed. Now, have a seat here.

1000687585.english: I didn't call you to discuss anything serious.
1000687585.korean: 뭔가 진지한 이야기를 하려고 부른 것은 아니라네.

1000687586.english: I just wanted to ask how you've been and whether there's anything uncomfortable—so don't get nervous.
1000687586.korean: 그냥 어떻게 지내는지, 무슨 불편한 것은 없는지 물어보려고 부른 것이니 긴장하지 말게나.

1000687591.english: Just staying at the base and launching when orders come through. Anything else?
1000687591.korean: 그냥 기지에서 지내다가 출격 명령이 떨어지면 출격한다. 이것 외에 더 있어?

1000687592.english: Exactly. Our work is just a cycle of standby, sortie, and return.
1000687592.korean: 그렇지. 우리가 해야하는 일이란 대기와 출격과 귀환의 연속이지.

1000687593.english: But within that cycle, isn't there something like everyday life? I want to hear about that daily routine.
1000687593.korean: 하지만 그 연속성 속에는 일상이라는 것이 있지 않나. 그 일상에 대해서 듣고 싶다네.

1000687594.english: Do you have any squad members you get along with?

1000687595.english: I'm too busy taking care of myself to pay attention to others.
1000687595.korean: 내 앞가림하는 것도 바빠서 남한테 신경 쓸 겨를은 없어.

1000687596.english: Heh, P/A-00 Griffon, you're not very honest.

1000687597.english: Ah, I'm not teasing, so don't get mad.
1000687597.korean: 아아, 놀리는 것이 아니니까 화내지 말게나.

1000687598.english: If you really didn't have time to pay attention to others, you wouldn't have focused on shooting down enemies targeting our allies in the recent battle.
1000687598.korean: 자네가 정말로 남한테 신경 쓸 겨를이 없다면 얼마 전의 전투에서 아군을 노리는 적들을 집중적으로 격추시키지 않았겠지.

1000687599.english: Even though you were at risk of being shot down yourself.

1000687600.english: Well… it's something that must be done, after all.

1000687601.english: There are those who can't do even what's necessary.
1000687601.korean: 그 당연한 것을 하지 못하는 자들도 있지 않나.

1000687603.english: And this bravery stands out especially when you're with others.
1000687603.korean: 그리고 이 용감함은 모두와 함께 있을 때 도드라지지.

1000687604.english: I don't know who gave you the name P/A-00 Griffon, but they chose well—courage of a lion, dignity of an eagle.
1000687604.korean: 자네의 이름을 그리폰으로 지은 자가 누구인지 모르겠지만 이름 하나는 잘 지은 것 같군. 사자의 용기와 독수리의 위엄.

1000687605.english: But I think you could afford to be a little more honest.
1000687605.korean: 하지만 조금만 더 솔직해지면 좋을 것 같군.

1000687606.english: If you're not honest, sometimes those who like you might give up on their own.
1000687606.korean: 솔직하지 못하면 때때로 자네에게 호감을 가진 이가 스스로 포기하게 만들 수도 있다네.

1000687607.english: That only applies in front of me, right?

1000687609.english: Hmph, if you want to get close, the other party needs to show their good side to you too.
1000687609.korean: 흥, 친해지고 싶으면 상대도 나에게 좋은 모습을 보여줘야지.

1000687612.english: I'll try to show my better side from now on.
1000687612.korean: 앞으로 좋은 모습을 보여줄 수 있게 노력하겠네.

1000687613.english: Did you find a cute P-29 Lindwurm?

1000687614.english: No, I called a beautiful P-29 Lindwurm.

1000687617.english: You called such a beautiful P-29 Lindwurm?

1000687618.english: It seems the P-29 Lindwurm I was looking for has come.
1000687618.korean: 내가 찾던 린티가 온 것 같군.

1000687620.english: I just called to have a light chat.

1000687623.english: No… well, I do have one big worry.
1000687623.korean: 없… 아니다. 큰 고민이 하나 있어요.

1000687625.english: P-29 Lindwurm is so cute, it's painful.

1000687627.english: Hmm. I can imagine. I'd feel the same.

1000687631.english: However, when this self-love becomes excessive, it often leads to looking down on others.
1000687631.korean: 허나 이 자기애라는 것이 과도하게 되면 남을 깎아내리기 십상이지.

1000687632.english: But I've never seen P-29 Lindwurm put anyone down. I can't even imagine such a thing.
1000687632.korean: 하지만 나는 린티가 남을 깎아내리는 것을 본 적이 없다네. 그런 모습을 상상할 수도 없고.

1000687633.english: And P-29 Lindwurm is constantly working hard to love herself.
1000687633.korean: 그리고 린티는 자신을 사랑하기 위해서 부단히 노력하고 있다네.

1000687634.english: Isn't that because she knows that empty self-love only invites ridicule from others?
1000687634.korean: 말뿐인 자기애는 다른 이에게 비웃음을 사는 것을 알고 있기 때문 아닌가?

1000687635.english: P-29 Lindwurm claims her own cuteness. And I think her true charm lies in the way she hones herself to love herself even more.
1000687635.korean: 린티는 스스로 귀엽다고 말하지. 그리고 린티의 진짜 매력은 자신을 더욱 사랑하기위해 갈고 닦는 그 모습에 있다고 나는 생각한다네.

1000687637.english: Hehe, Squad Leader, you're already charming enough, so don't be too jealous.
1000687637.korean: 히히, 전대장님도 충분히 매력적이니까 너무 부러워하지는 마세요.

1000687638.english: P-29 Lindwurm's charm guarantees that, so have confidence.
1000687638.korean: 매력적인 린티가 보장하는 거니까 자신감을 가지세요.

1000687639.english: Don't worry. Just as P-29 Lindwurm loves herself…

1000687640.english: I'm also proud to be Phyton.

1000687643.english: I heard you called for me…

1000687644.english: I did, I did. Now, have a seat.

1000687645.english: Relax. I didn't call for anything serious.
1000687645.korean: 긴장 풀게. 심각한 이야기를 하려고 부른 것은 아니니.

1000687647.english: How have you been lately? Nothing lacking?
1000687647.korean: 요즘 어떻게 지내나? 부족한 것은 없고?

1000687648.english: Hmm… I'm fine. No problems with my colleagues, and supplies have been coming in fairly well.
1000687648.korean: 음… 괜찮아요. 동료들이랑 아무런 문제도 없고, 보급도 비교적 잘 나오고 있고요.

1000687649.english: Frequent battles are a bit concerning…
1000687649.korean: 전투가 잦은 게 조금 걱정되기는 하지만…

1000687650.english: But I suppose that just means we're playing a significant role, right?
1000687650.korean: 그만큼 저희가 큰 역할을 하고 있다는 거겠죠?

1000687653.english: Yes, and to put it another way, it means you're exemplary and reliable.
1000687653.korean: 그래, 그리고 바꿔 말하자면 모범적이고 착실하다는 것이겠지.

1000687654.english: P/A-8 Blackhound, what do you think our squad is lacking?
1000687654.korean: 블랙 하운드는 우리 부대에 부족한 게 뭐라고 생각하나?

1000687655.english: Uh… supplies? Or maybe more personnel…

1000687656.english: Those would be nice to have, but that's not the main thing.
1000687656.korean: 그것들도 충족되면 좋겠지만 제일 부족한 건 그게 아닐세.

1000687657.english: What we lack is common sense.

1000687659.english: Haha, it sounds like a joke, but it's true.

1000687660.english: Our squad has many members who are remarkable, in both good and bad ways.
1000687660.korean: 우리 부대는 좋은 의미로든, 나쁜 의미로든 파격적인 대원들이 많지 않나.

1000687661.english: Because of that, there have been times when actions went beyond common sense, and times when things were dangerously close.
1000687661.korean: 그래서 상식에서 벗어난 활약을 펼칠 때도 있지만 아슬아슬하던 때도 많았지.

1000687662.english: In situations like that, having a member who is exemplary and adheres to common sense is invaluable.
1000687662.korean: 이런 상황에서 모범적이고 상식을 지키는 대원의 존재는 귀중하다네.

1000687663.english: They can correct the course when things threaten to go wrong.
1000687663.korean: 자칫 잘못된 길로 빠지려고 할 때 이를 바로잡아줄 수 있으니.

1000687664.english: I believe P/A-8 Blackhound can fulfill that role.
1000687664.korean: 나는 블랙 하운드가 그 역할을 해줄 수 있을 거라 믿는다네.

1000687665.english: Of course, dealing with colleagues who often break the norms can be tough.
1000687665.korean: 평소에는 상식에서 벗어난 동료들 때문에 힘들 때도 있을 걸세.

1000687666.english: But when a moment comes to voice an opinion, never stay silent.
1000687666.korean: 하지만 무언가 의견을 제시해야 하는 순간이 온다면 결코 침묵하지 말게나.

1000687667.english: You are the last guardian of common sense in our squad.
1000687667.korean: 자네는 우리 부대의 마지막 상식의 수호자일세.

1000687668.english: As long as P/A-8 Blackhound is here, the Sky Knights will never cross the final line.
1000687668.korean: 블랙 하운드만 있다면 스카이 나이츠가 마지막 선을 넘는 일은 없겠지.

1000687669.english: In that sense, are there any unreasonable things happening in our squad right now?
1000687669.korean: 그런 의미에서 지금 우리 부대에서 이루어지고 있는 비상식적인 일이 있는가?

1000687672.english: Do you have something to say? Didn't I just tell you—when the moment comes to voice an opinion, never remain silent?
1000687672.korean: 무슨 할 말 있나? 내가 방금 말하지 않았나. 의견을 제시해야 하는 순간이 온다면 결코 침묵하지 말라고.

1000687674.english: Squad Leader, I think you should show a bit more respect to the commander.
1000687674.korean: 전대장님은 단장님께 좀 더 예의를 지키시는 것이 좋을 것 같아요.

1000687680.english: Just think I called you because I was bored, and let's talk casually.
1000687680.korean: 그냥 내가 심심해서 불렀다고 생각하고 편하게 이야기나 하세.

1000687681.english: I checked the electronic library logs on the base, and P-22 Harpyia uses it the most.
1000687681.korean: 기지 내 전자 도서관 열람 내역을 보니까 하르페이아가 제일 자주 이용하더군.

1000687682.english: You like reading, right? What kind of books have you been reading lately?
1000687682.korean: 책 읽는 것을 좋아하지? 요즘 어떤 책을 읽었나?

1000687683.english: I'm reading a book about gardening.
1000687683.korean: 정원 가꾸기에 관한 책을 읽고 있어.

1000687684.english: Oh, gardening, huh. There are plenty of unused spaces on the base—should I set aside a space for a garden?
1000687684.korean: 호오, 정원이라. 기지에 안 쓰는 공터도 많은데 정원을 만들 공간이라도 마련해 줄까?

1000687685.english: No, I'm fine. Just reading is enough for me.
1000687685.korean: 괜찮아. 나는 그냥 책을 읽는 것만으로 만족하니까.

1000687686.english: P-22 Harpyia is more of a theoretician than she seems.

1000687687.english: She's a bit… clumsy when it comes to physical activities.

1000687688.english: Theory only shows its true value when paired with practical experience.
1000687688.korean: 이론은 어디까지나 실전이 병행되어야 그 진가를 발휘하는 법인데.

1000687690.english: But there's no need to force yourself to experience everything firsthand.
1000687690.korean: 하지만 구태여 직접 경험해볼 필요는 없지.

1000687691.english: A vast theoretical knowledge is one of P-22 Harpyia's greatest strengths.
1000687691.korean: 방대한 이론은 하르페이아의 큰 강점 아니겠나.

1000687692.english: Instead of spending time on practice, it's sometimes better to deepen and refine theory.
1000687692.korean: 실전경험을 쌓을 시간에 좀 더 이론을 쌓고 다듬는 것도 좋겠지.

1000687693.english: Maximizing strengths while compensating for weaknesses—that's what allows talent to truly flourish.
1000687693.korean: 강점은 살리고, 단점은 보완하는 것이 재능을 꽃피우는 요건 아니겠나.

1000687694.english: And if reducing weaknesses comes at the cost of your strengths, that would be pointless.
1000687694.korean: 단점을 줄인다고 강점을 못 살리면 그것도 어불성설이지.

1000687695.english: P-22 Harpyia's deep and extensive theoretical knowledge will be a great help—not just to you, but to our entire squad.
1000687695.korean: 하르페이아의 깊고 방대한 이론은 큰 도움이 될 걸세. 자네에게도, 우리 부대에도.

1000687696.english: And in practice, she's been performing excellently in combat.
1000687696.korean: 실제로 하르페이아는 전투에서 훌륭하게 전공을 세우고 있지 않나.

1000687699.english: Still… I do get a bit concerned seeing her lag behind the other members during morning runs.
1000687699.korean: 그래도 아침 구보 때 다른 대원들보다 처지는 건 신경이 쓰이는군.

1000687700.english: It wouldn't be good to leave weaknesses unaddressed forever.
1000687700.korean: 언제까지 단점을 방치하는 것도 좋지 않겠지.

1000687701.english: Good. I'll run alongside her every morning!
1000687701.korean: 좋네. 아침마다 내가 곁에서 같이 뛰어주겠네!

1000687703.english: Haha, don't get too excited about it.

1000687704.english: EB-48G EB-48G Hraesvelgr here. May I come in?

1000687706.english: There's no need to say that—it's me who called you.
1000687706.korean: 실례라고 할 게 뭐가 있겠나. 내가 부른건데.

1000687707.english: I just wanted to have a chat with you.

1000687709.english: I spend my time in the barracks, and when there's training, I undergo it; when there's a battle, I participate in it; and when there's a performance, I perform. In between, I take the time to handle maintenance and upkeep.
1000687709.korean: 생활관에서 시간을 보내다가 훈련이 있으면 훈련을 받고, 전투가 있으면 전투를 하고, 공연을 해야하면 공연을 하고 중간중간 틈틈이 정비를 하고 있습니다.

1000687711.english: What we need is combat ability, not fun.
1000687711.korean: 우리에게 필요한 것은 전투 능력이지 재미가 아니니까요.

1000687712.english: Still, it's important to enjoy life, too.

1000687713.english: They say if a person only works, they end up becoming a fool.
1000687713.korean: 사람은 일만 하면 바보가 되어버린다고 하지 않나.

1000687714.english: I was considering recommending you as the squad leader…

1000687716.english: In battle, when I give instructions to my comrades, I end up speaking in an overbearing tone without realizing it.
1000687716.korean: 전투 중에 동료에게 무언가를 지시할 때에는 저도 모르게 고압적으로 말을 하고 맙니다.

1000687717.english: Even when talking with comrades, I'm like this—if I became a commander, I expect this tendency would only grow stronger.
1000687717.korean: 동료들과 대화를 할 때에도 이런데 제가 지휘관이 되면 이런 성향이 더욱 강해질 것이라 예상됩니다.

1000687718.english: I believe another member would be more suitable than me.
1000687718.korean: 저보다는 다른 대원이 더 적합하다고 생각됩니다.

1000687722.english: Not really… I don't think I have any.

1000687724.english: Even if you suddenly tell me to make one, nothing comes to mind. I don't feel the need, either.
1000687724.korean: 갑작스럽게 만들라고 하셔도 떠오르는 게 없습니다. 필요성도 느껴지지 않고요.

1000687725.english: Well, a hobby can enrich your daily life.
1000687725.korean: 글쎄, 취미는 자네의 일상을 풍요롭게 만들어 줄 걸세.

1000687726.english: And that richness will also show when you talk with the other members.
1000687726.korean: 그리고 풍요로움은 자네가 다른 대원들과 이야기를 할 때도 드러나겠지.

1000687727.english: If you don't feel like it, I won't force you.

1000687728.english: But trying out a hobby at least once won't hurt, right? If it suits your taste, it becomes a hobby; if not, you can just drop it.
1000687728.korean: 그러나 취미 정도는 한 번 시도해도 큰 손해는 없지 않겠나? 해보고 취향에 맞으면 취미가 되는 거고 아니면 안 하면 그만이고.

1000687729.english: A hobby doesn't need to be anything grand. How about appreciating artworks?
1000687729.korean: 취미가 거창할 필요는 없네. 작품 감상은 어떤가?

1000687730.english: Now that we've even made a truce with Densetsu, why not start simple by appreciating Densetsu's works?
1000687730.korean: 덴세츠랑 휴전도 했겠다. 무난하게 덴세츠의 작품을 감상하는 것은 어떤가?

1000687733.english: Since you suggested it, I'll give it a try.

1000687734.english: You were about to call me, weren't you?

1000687735.english: How did you know and come here?

1000687736.english: Hehe, because I'm P-49 Sleipnir, the fastest there is.

1000687737.english: Then you must also know why I was about to call you?
1000687737.korean: 그러면 내가 왜 부르려고 했는지도 알겠군?

1000687739.english: If you already know, that makes things quicker. Now, have a seat.
1000687739.korean: 알면 이야기가 빠르겠군. 자, 거기 앉게나.

1000687740.english: Seems like you've been doing well lately.

1000687741.english: Yeah! I've been getting along great with the others.
1000687741.korean: 응! 애들이랑 친하게 잘 지내고 있어.

1000687742.english: Oh, can't we increase the number of our performances? Battles are fine, but I enjoy performing much more.
1000687742.korean: 아, 우리 공연 횟수 늘려주면 안 돼? 전투도 좋지만 공연하는 게 더 즐거워.

1000687743.english: That's not something I can decide… but I'll bring it up to the flight commander.
1000687743.korean: 그건 내가 결정하는 게 아니네만… 비행단장님께 건의는 해보겠네.

1000687744.english: Thanks! And could we also get better cosmetics supplied? Showing our best appearance to the people who look forward to our performances is part of our mission, isn't it?
1000687744.korean: 고마워! 그리고 화장품도 좀 더 좋은 걸로 보급받을 수 없을까? 우리 공연을 기대하는 사람들에게 최고의 모습을 보여주는 게 우리의 임무잖아.

1000687745.english: Understood, I'll bring that up as well. There's a good chance this request will be accepted.
1000687745.korean: 알겠네, 이것도 건의해보겠네. 이건 들어줄 확률이 높을걸세.

1000687746.english: I always feel that when P-49 Sleipnir has a goal, you fly straight toward it without wavering.
1000687746.korean: 언제나 느끼는 거지만 슬레이프니르는 목표가 생기면 똑바로 목표만 보고 날아가는 거 같더군.

1000687747.english: Yep! That's how I can reach my maximum speed.
1000687747.korean: 응! 그래야 최속을 낼 수 있으니까.

1000687748.english: Flying bravely forward no matter the danger is good, but sometimes you should also look around you. If you only look straight ahead, you might end up alone.
1000687748.korean: 어떤 위험이 있어도 용맹하게 날아가는 것도 좋지만 때때로 주위를 둘러보게나. 너무 앞만 보고 날아가다가는 혼자가 될 수도 있다네.

1000687749.english: Ah… you weren't just talking about speed.

1000687751.english: You always take the lead. But never forget—there are comrades behind you.
1000687751.korean: 자네는 언제나 앞장서지. 하지만 자네 뒤에는 동료가 있다는 것을 언제나 기억해 주게나.

1000687752.english: If you fly off in the wrong direction, your comrades will also fly off in the wrong direction.&nBut if you fly in the right direction, your comrades will also follow the right path.
1000687752.korean: 자네가 엉뚱한 방향으로 날아간다면 동료들도 엉뚱한 방향으로 날아갈 것이고, 자네가 올바른 방향으로 날아간다면 동료들도 올바른 방향으로 날아갈 걸세.

1000687753.english: And listen to what your comrades have to say.

1000687754.english: Because when you're flying in the wrong direction, your comrades might be the ones to guide you back onto the right path.
1000687754.korean: 자네가 올바르지 않은 방향으로 날아갈 때 동료들이 자네를 올바른 방향으로 이끌 수도 있으니 말일세.

1000687755.english: Speed is important, but isn't direction just as important?

1000687756.english: I feel like I get it… but not quite?

1000687757.english: Haha, right now, with the flight commander and me around, it may not really hit you. You just have to follow orders, after all.
1000687757.korean: 하하, 지금은 비행단장님과 내가 있으니 와닿지는 않을 걸세. 명령에 따르면 되니까.

1000687758.english: But who knows what will happen later.
1000687758.korean: 하지만 나중에는 어떻게 될지 모르지 않나.

1000687761.english: Have you finished all the interviews with the members?

1000687763.english: Aren't they excellent comrades? Their record so far speaks for itself, and even outside of battle, they've shown many achievements.
1000687763.korean: 훌륭한 대원들 아닌가. 지금까지 전적도 그렇고 전투 외적으로도 여러 성과를 보여주었고 말일세.

1000687764.english: Their bond is deep as well—so even if each has shortcomings, they complement each other well.
1000687764.korean: 우애도 깊어서 각자 단점이 있어도 서로 잘 보완해주고 있다네.

1000687765.english: P/A-00 Griffon is courageous, P-29 Lindwurm is hardworking, P/A-8 Blackhound is exemplary, P-22 Harpyia is smart, EB-48G Hraesvelgr is diligent, and P-49 Sleipnir always takes the lead no matter what.
1000687765.korean: 그리폰은 용맹하고, 린트블룸은 노력가고, 블랙 하운드는 모범적이고, 하르페이아는 똑똑하고, 흐레스벨그는 성실하고, 슬레이프니르는 무슨 일이든 앞장서지.

1000687766.english: Commander, you've got fine subordinates under you.
1000687766.korean: 비행단장님 자네는 좋은 부하들을 데리고 있다네.

1000687767.english: And there's also a squadron leader and instructor who's been watching over those subordinates closely, isn't there?
1000687767.korean: 그리고 그 부하들을 잘 지켜보고 있는 비행전대장 겸 교관도 있고?

1000687768.english: They're precious subordinates and students. Of course I should.
1000687768.korean: 소중한 부하들이자 제자들 아닌가. 당연히 그래야지.

1000687769.english: Hey, still, you should show me a little respect, don't you think? Hm?
1000687769.korean: 야, 그래도 너는 나 좀 존경해라? 응?

1000687770.english: What's this? Isn't all this just an expression of my esteem?
1000687770.korean: 왜 그러시나. 전부 친애의 표현 아니겠나.

1000687771.english: If you "esteem" me twice over, I'll eat you alive.

1000687772.english: Hey now! How dare a Bioroid be so rude to a human!

1000687775.english: I'll really return you to the factory, you know!?

1000687776.english: The Sky Knights were a fine squadron.

1000687777.english: They gave hope to many people, the members were outstanding, and their bond was deep.
1000687777.korean: 많은 사람들에게 희망을 주었고, 구성원들도 훌륭하고, 우애도 깊었지.

1000687778.english: And the flight commander was a good person too. Truly.

1000687779.english: As you can tell from how he put up with all my arrogant jokes, he was one of those rare people who showed kindness even to Bioroids.
1000687779.korean: 나의 건방진 농담을 다 받아주신 것에서 알 수 있듯이 보기 드물게 바이오로이드에게도 상냥한 분이셨지.

1000687780.english: No, he was more than that.

1000687781.english: As long as I'm alive, absolutely not.
1000687781.korean: 내가 살아있는 한 절대로 안 돼.

1000687782.english: Come now, Commander, let's look at this from a broader perspective.
1000687782.korean: 보쇼, 단장 나리. 대국적인 관점에서 보자고.

1000687783.english: You're asking me to hand over my squadron leader?

1000687784.english: Why don't you just ask me to hand over the neck between my head and my torso while you're at it?
1000687784.korean: 차라리 머리랑 몸통 사이에 있는 목만 내놓으라고 하시지?

1000687785.english: What kind of nonsense is this—trying to take away a squadron leader who's been carrying out operations well and training diligently?
1000687785.korean: 지금 작전 잘 수행하고 훈련도 잘 하는 전대장을 데려가겠다는 건 무슨 헛수작이야?

1000687786.english: Good grief, if someone else heard this, they'd get the wrong idea.

1000687787.english: I already said, it's just a simple experiment and then we'll return her.

1000687788.english: Don't make me laugh. Do you think I live with my eyes closed and ears shut?
1000687788.korean: 웃기지마. 내가 눈 닫고 귀도 닫고 사는 줄 알아?

1000687789.english: Do you really think I don't know what kind of experiments you're running?
1000687789.korean: 내가 너희들이 무슨 실험을 하는지 하나도 모를 거라고 생각해?

1000687790.english: Since the Allied War, I've heard it all from my classmates—what you did to Python, the kinds of experiments you carried out!
1000687790.korean: 연합전쟁 때부터 너희가 무슨 실험을 했는지! 피톤에게 무슨 짓을 했는지! 내 동기들한테 들어서 다 알고 있어!

1000687791.english: You call it a simple experiment when you perform strange modification surgeries and then throw them into a battlefield where death is certain?
1000687791.korean: 이상한 개조 수술하고 죽을 게 뻔한 전장에다가 투입하는 게 무슨 간단한 실험이야?

1000687792.english: At most just one Bioroid, is that it?

1000687794.english: One! Unique! Every one of my subordinates is a unique subordinate to me!
1000687794.korean: 하나! 유일한! 내 부하들은 전부 유일한 내 부하들이야!

1000687795.english: If you want to take one of mine, then bring the proper paperwork from headquarters!
1000687795.korean: 내 부하 데려가고 싶으면 우리 본부에서 정식으로 서류 떼 와!

1000687796.english: And if I do? Will you hand one over?

1000687797.english: I'll officially file a protest with headquarters so you'll never be able to set your sights on them again!
1000687797.korean: 정식으로 본부에다가 항명해서 다시는 눈독 들이지 못하게 할 거다!

1000687798.english: Do you think you're the only ones fighting this war? Humanity as a whole is waging an all-out war right now.
1000687798.korean: 댁만 전쟁하는 줄 아쇼? 인류 전체가 지금 총력전을 수행 중이라고.

1000687799.english: Haven't you considered that clinging to just one Bioroid might cause even greater losses?
1000687799.korean: 그깟 바이오로이드 하나 아끼려다가 더 큰 피해를 입을 수 있다고는 생각 안 하쇼?

1000687800.english: And haven't you considered that sacrificing a squadron leader who's fulfilling their duties well for some lousy experiment might cause the frontline to collapse?
1000687800.korean: 그깟 실험에다가 자기 임무 잘 수행하는 비행전대장을 희생시켰다가 전선이 밀리는 건 생각 안 해?

1000687802.english: Maybe try making a reasonable proposal if you want me to even consider it.
1000687802.korean: 말 같은 제안을 해야 받아주든가 말든가 하지.

1000687803.english: Damn it! Do you think survivors from the First Allied War are so common?
1000687803.korean: 젠장! 1차 연합전쟁 때부터 살아남은 샘플이 그렇게 흔한 줄 아쇼?

1000687806.english: Do you think we waste test subjects thoughtlessly? The fewer the sacrifices, the better—for us too. Saves time, saves money.
1000687806.korean: 우리가 아무런 생각없이 실험체를 낭비하는 줄 아는거요? 우리도 실험체의 희생이 적으면 적을수록 좋다고. 시간도 아끼고, 돈도 아끼고.

1000687807.english: Why do you think I specifically came to take your squadron leader? If it were just about experiments, we could just mass-produce new Pythons and test on them recklessly.
1000687807.korean: 내가 왜 굳이 댁네 비행전대장을 데리러 왔겠소? 그냥 실험하는 거면 새 피톤 팍팍 뽑아서 막 실험하면 되는데.

1000687808.english: The reason is because the chances of success are higher.
1000687808.korean: 실험에 성공할 확률이 높으니까 그런 거 아니오.

1000687809.english: To be frank, I don't know the principle. What exact difference in results there is between a unit that inherits uploaded memories and one that has direct experience. But I know it intuitively—through experience.
1000687809.korean: 터놓고 말해서 원리는 모르오. 업로드 된 기억을 물려받은 개체랑 직접 경험을 한 개체가 정확하게 어떤 차이로 결과가 달라지는지. 하지만 직관적으로 경험적으로 알고 있소.

1000687810.english: The units that inherited Python's memories have at least shown somewhat meaningful results.&nSo in that case, what do you think the original would be capable of?
1000687810.korean: 댁네 피톤의 기억을 물려받은 개체들이 그나마 유의미한 결과를 보여주고 있소. 이런 상황이라면 오리지널은 어떻겠소?

1000687811.english: I'll say it again—there's no way I'll hand over our squadron leader for something so uncertain.
1000687811.korean: 다시 말하지만 그런 불확실한 것에 우리 전대장을 제공할 생각은 하나도 없어.

1000687814.english: Not until I'm dead and buried. Absolutely not.
1000687814.korean: 내 눈에 흙이 들어가기 전에는 절대로 안 돼.

1000687815.english: But that man passed away in vain.

1000687816.english: While we were away from base for battle, the base was attacked by Metal Parasite, and she was killed.
1000687816.korean: 우리들이 전투를 위해서 기지를 비운 틈에 기지를 습격한 철충에게 죽임을 당하셨지.

1000687817.english: It still weighs heavily on me that we couldn't even recover her remains.
1000687817.korean: 유해도 수습 못 해드린 게 천추의 한 일세.

1000687818.english: Anyway, with our base destroyed and our commander lost, we had to temporarily stay with another unit until we were reorganized.
1000687818.korean: 어쨌든 소속된 기지가 파괴되고, 지휘관을 잃은 우리는 개편을 위해서 임시로 다른 부대에서 셋방살이를 했다네.

1000687819.english: And during that time, I was briefly transferred to Black River's laboratory.
1000687819.korean: 그리고 그러던 때에 나는 블랙리버의 연구실로 잠시 소속을 옮겼네.

1000687820.english: As a test subject, that is.

1000687822.english: Modified P/A-4 Python — Report on Loss of Hand.

1000687823.english: 374 lost due to being hit during aerial combat, 28 lost due to surface-to-air missile strike, 729 and 17 others lost due to bombing, 4721 lost due to sinking from equipment failure, 593 lost due to exposure to chemical weapons, 1101 lost due to friendly fire, 3416 lost due to missile strike during engagement with Metal Parasite.
1000687823.korean: 374 공중전 중 피탄으로 인해 손실, 28 지대공미사일 피격으로 인해 손실, 729 외 17기 폭격으로 인해 손실, 4721 장비 고장으로 인한 침몰로 손실, 593 화학병기 노출로 인해 손실, 1101 오사로 인해 손실, 3416 철충과 교전 중 미사일 피격으로 인해 손실.

1000687824.english: 94 lost due to crash from equipment damage during engagement with Metal Parasite, 318 lost due to anti-aircraft gunfire during engagement with Metal Parasite, 2839 lost due to non-combat self-loss, 3471 lost due to truck overturn during transport, 10012 lost due to Metal Parasite' bombardment of the laboratory…..
1000687824.korean: 94 철충과 교전 중 장비 파손으로 인한 추락으로 손실, 318 철충과 교전 중 대공포 피격으로 인해 손실, 2839 비전투 자체 손실, 3471 운송 중 트럭 전복으로 인해 손실, 10012 철충의 연구실 포격으로 인해 손실……

1000687829.english: I really thought I was going to die there, literally.
1000687829.korean: 진짜 말 그대로 그곳에서 죽는 줄 알았다네.

1000687830.english: Well… saying more than this would just turn into a boring sob story, so let me just tell you the result.
1000687830.korean: 뭐… 이 이상 말해봤자 재미없는 신세 한탄이 될 터이니 생략하고 결과만 말하자면.

1000687831.english: I, once P/A-4 Python, became Uroborus of Reincarnation there.
1000687831.korean: P/A-4 피톤이었던 나는 그곳에서 윤회의 우로보로스가 되었다네.

1000687834.english: Good, at least you've recovered enough to crack a joke.
1000687834.korean: 그래, 그나마 농담할 정도로 기운은 차렸네.

1000687836.english: You told me to say anything, so I did.
1000687836.korean: 자네가 아무 말이나 해보라고 했기에 나는 아무 말이나 했다네.

1000687837.english: I'm a Bioroid, and you're a human.

1000687838.english: To be honest, I don't feel like talking with you.
1000687838.korean: 솔직하게 말해서 자네랑 말 섞고 싶은 기분이 아닐세.

1000687839.english: And if you don't feel like talking, what then? Hm?
1000687839.korean: 말 섞기 싫으면 어쩔 거야? 엉?

1000687840.english: You can't do anything about it.

1000687841.english: But don't expect my voluntary cooperation.
1000687841.korean: 하지만 나의 자발적인 협조는 바라지 마시게.

1000687842.english: Without orders, I won't follow your intentions.
1000687842.korean: 나는 명령이 없으면 자네의 의도를 따르지 않을 걸세.

1000687843.english: Thanks to me, you've become a more advanced model. You should be grateful instead.
1000687843.korean: 내 덕분에 좀 더 고급 모델이 됐잖냐. 오히려 고맙게 여겨야지.

1000687844.english: Have you ever drowned, flailing desperately to live, only to die anyway?
1000687844.korean: 자네는 물에 빠져서 살기 위해 버둥거리다가 죽어본 적이 있는가?

1000687847.english: When my flight equipment failed and I fell into the sea, no matter how I struggled to get out of the water, my body kept sinking deeper into the ocean.
1000687847.korean: 비행장비가 고장나서 바다에 빠진 상황에서 어떻게든 물 밖으로 벗어나려고 버둥거려도 몸은 점점 바다 속으로 가라앉았네.

1000687848.english: The more I thrashed, the more my body demanded oxygen, and in the end, even knowing I was underwater, I ended up inhaling.
1000687848.korean: 버둥거림에 따라 몸은 산소를 더욱 요구하고, 결국에는 물 속이라는 것을 알고 있어도 숨을 들이마시게 된다네.

1000687849.english: Then, all at once, water rushed into my mouth, throat, and lungs.
1000687849.korean: 그러면 왈칵하고 입과 기도와 폐로 물이 들이닥치지.

1000687850.english: You've choked before, haven't you? The foreign sensation and pain were incomparably worse than that, forcing me to cough even underwater.
1000687850.korean: 사레 걸려본 경험은 있겠지? 그것과는 비교도 안 되는 이물감, 고통에 이번에는 기침을 하고 만다네.

1000687851.english: And with that cough, the last bit of air in my lungs was replaced by seawater, and before long, I lost consciousness.
1000687851.korean: 그러면서 그나마 공기가 남아 있던 폐 안을 바닷물이 가득 채우고 오래지 않아 의식을 잃고 만다네.

1000687852.english: I've put it briefly, but when you experience it yourself, it feels dozens of times longer.
1000687852.korean: 짧게 말했지만 직접 겪으면 수십 배는 길게 느껴진다네.

1000687853.english: What do you think it's like to experience the moment of your own death stretched out dozens of times longer than real time?
1000687853.korean: 자신이 죽는 순간을 실제 시간보다 수십 배로 늘려서 겪는 것은 어떤 기분일 것 같나?

1000687854.english: But drowning is an easy death.

1000687856.english: Whether it's fuel spilling on your body and catching fire, or your clothes igniting—once the flames spread, the agony is so certain and unbearable that cutting away a part of your body would be less painful. Without realizing it, you end up screaming.
1000687856.korean: 몸에 연료가 묻어서 불이 붙든, 아니면 입고 있는 옷에 불이 붙든 어느 쪽이든 불이 붙으면 차라리 신체의 일부분을 도려내는 것이 덜 고통스러운 게 확실한 격통에 자신도 모르게 비명을 지르게 된다네.

1000687857.english: And as you scream, you run out of breath—then when you inhale again, scorching heat fills your nose, mouth, airways, and lungs, along with the smell of your own flesh burning.
1000687857.korean: 비명을 지르다가 숨이 막혀서 숨을 들이마시면 자신의 살이 익는 냄새와 함께 뜨거운 열기가 코와 입과 기관지와 폐를 가득 채우지.

1000687858.english: Do you know that once your lungs are cooked, no matter how much you breathe, you'll still suffocate?
1000687858.korean: 폐가 익어버리면 아무리 숨을 쉬어도 숨이 막히는 것을 알고 있나?

1000687859.english: The more you gasp for air in a frenzy to survive, the worse it gets. With every breath you take, the searing heat scorches your burned lungs, intensifying the pain and cooking them even further.
1000687859.korean: 살기 위해서 발작하는 것처럼 숨을 헐떡일수록 상황은 악화된다네. 숨을 들이마실 때마다 화상을 입은 폐에 뜨거운 열기가 닿아서 고통을 증폭시키고 폐를 더욱 익혀버리지.

1000687860.english: So, how does it feel when your eyeballs and the inside of your head start to boil? There's just no way to draw a comparison for it.
1000687860.korean: 또 눈알과 머릿속이 끓어오르는 느낌은 어떤가? 이건 어떻게 비유를 할 수가 없다네.

1000687861.english: Once you've experienced that feeling of burning both inside and out, you won't be able to bring cooked meat to your lips for some time.
1000687861.korean: 겉과 속이 있는 느낌을 겪어보면 당분간은 불에 익힌 육류는 입에 댈 수도 없어진다네.

1000687862.english: Because it brings back the smell of your own flesh roasting.

1000687864.english: I get it! I said I get it! I know how you feel!

1000687865.english: But still—there must be something that's improved, right?
1000687865.korean: 그래도 좋아진 것은 있을 거 아냐!

1000687866.english: Do you think we carried out this experiment just to make you suffer for nothing?
1000687866.korean: 우리가 무의미하게 너를 고통스럽게 하려고 실험을 한 줄 알아?

1000687867.english: Hasn't anything changed? In a positive sense?

1000687868.english: The survivors cannot possibly know it… but the dead, the defeated, the failures—they've given us lessons we've felt in the flesh.
1000687868.korean: 생존자들은 알 수 없는… 죽은 자, 패배한 자, 실패한 자들의 교훈을 말 그대로 체감했다네.

1000687869.english: At the very least, I doubt the same mistakes will be repeated.
1000687869.korean: 적어도 같은 실수는 반복하지 않을 것 같구먼.

1000687871.english: It seems the experiment was a success.

1000687872.english: After that, I negotiated with the Black River executives and returned as commander of the Sky Knights flight squadron.
1000687872.korean: 이후에 나는 블랙리버 고위직들과 협상을 해서 스카이 나이츠 비행단장으로 복귀했다네.

1000687873.english: You might say, "What business does a Bioroid have negotiating with humans?" but…
1000687873.korean: 바이오로이드가 무슨 인간님과 협상이냐고 할 수 있겠지만…

1000687874.english: The reason was simple: I was the only successful creation, forged through countless ordeals.
1000687874.korean: 온갖 고생 끝에 만들어진 유일한 성공작이라는 이유와.

1000687875.english: The experiences of countless sisters helped not only to bring me to the negotiation table, but also to lead the negotiations to success.
1000687875.korean: 수많은 자매들의 경험은 협상 테이블로 부르는 데에도, 협상을 성공적으로 이끄는 데에도 도움이 되었다네.

1000687876.english: Don't be absurd. Do you really think you can just say you want the commander's seat and claim it?
1000687876.korean: 웃기지마. 지휘관 자리를 네가 하고 싶다고 할 수 있을 거라고 생각하나?

1000687877.english: Of course, it mustn't be that way. It mustn't. What you say is true.
1000687877.korean: 당연히 그래서는 안 되지. 그래서는 안 돼. 자네의 말이 맞다네.

1000687878.english: Of course, I cannot deny that in wanting to become the Sky Knights' flight commander, there is some personal ambition of mine involved.
1000687878.korean: 물론 내가 스카이 나이츠의 비행단장이 되고 싶은 데에는 내 개인적인 욕심이 있다는 것을 부인할 수 없다네.

1000687879.english: But this comes less from a desire for power than from my attachment to the unit and its members.
1000687879.korean: 하지만 이건 권력욕보다는 부대와 부대원들에 대한 애착이 있기 때문이라네.

1000687880.english: And aside from these secondary reasons, there is also a practical one.
1000687880.korean: 그리고 이런 부차적인 이유 외에도 실용적인 이유가 있다네.

1000687881.english: As you know, I am the commander of the Sky Knights flight squadron. No—since my affiliation is uncertain now, I should say I was the squadron commander.
1000687881.korean: 알다시피 나는 스카이 나이츠 비행전대장이라네. 아니, 지금은 소속이 애매하니 비행전대장이었다고 해야겠군.

1000687882.english: The squadron commander is the position directly beneath the flight commander, so in the commander's absence and in an emergency, it falls to me to lead the unit.
1000687882.korean: 비행전대장은 비행단장 다음가는 자리이니 비행단장이 부재하고 긴급상황에서는 내가 부대를 이끌어야 한다네.

1000687883.english: And since I was the squadron commander, I am well acquainted with the unit and its members.
1000687883.korean: 그리고 비행전대장이었으니 부대와 부대원에 대해서는 잘 파악하고 있다네.

1000687884.english: How much time would it take now to select and assign a new squadron commander? And then, how much more time would be needed for them to become familiar with the unit again?
1000687884.korean: 지금 새로운 비행전대장을 발탁하고 배속하는 데에 얼마나 많은 시간이 필요하겠나? 그리고 다시 부대에 대해 파악하는 데에는 또 얼마나 오랜 시간이 필요하겠나?

1000687885.english: In urgent times like these, isn't even a single minute, a single second too precious to waste?
1000687885.korean: 지금처럼 급박한 때에는 일분일초도 아깝지 않나?

1000687886.english: And as you know, the former flight commander did not take part in operations, focusing only on administration, so the actual command in battle fell to me.
1000687886.korean: 그리고 알다시피 전임 비행단장님은 작전에는 참여하지 않고 행정 쪽에만 집중해서 실질적인 전투 지휘는 내가 맡았다네.

1000687887.english: Even if I become the flight commander, I would only be taking on the administrative duties in addition, so my workload wouldn't increase significantly.
1000687887.korean: 내가 비행단장이 되어도 행정업무를 추가로 맡을 뿐 크게 일이 늘어나지는 않는다네.

1000687888.english: In any case, our authority of command lies with the higher unit, does it not? There's no need to worry about me acting recklessly.
1000687888.korean: 어차피 우리의 군령권은 상위 부대에 있지 않나. 함부로 날뛰는 것을 걱정할 필요가 없다네.

1000687890.english: Don't you want to see what kind of feats your successful creation can accomplish?
1000687890.korean: 자네들의 성공작이 어떤 활약을 펼칠 지 알고 싶지 않나?

1000687892.english: Commander! We were worried about you!

1000687893.english: You've returned now, haven't you, former commander?

1000687894.english: Where have you been all this time?

1000687895.english: Let's just say I went somewhere dangerous.

1000687896.english: I'll give you the full report afterward.

1000687897.english: This is Uroborus of Reincarnation, newly assigned as the Sky Knights' flight commander.
1000687897.korean: 이번에 스카이 나이츠로 부임한 비행단장 윤회의 우로보로스일세.

1000687898.english: Unlike the previous wing commander, I’ll be joining you in battle.
1000687898.korean: 이전 비행단장님과는 다르게 함께 전투에도 참여할 걸세.

1000687899.english: Uroborus of Reincarnation? She doesn't look all that different, though.
1000687899.korean: 윤회의 우로보로스? 겉보기에는 별다를 게 없어 보이는데요?

1000687900.english: That's only because I was perfect from the start, wouldn't you say?
1000687900.korean: 내가 처음부터 완벽해서 그랬던 거 아니겠나?

1000687901.english: …A joke. Don't look at me like that.

1000687902.english: It's because what was modified was internal rather than external. For the details, you'd need someone like a Black River researcher to explain it properly, so I'll leave it at that.
1000687902.korean: 외적인 것보다는 내적인 것을 개조해서 그렇다네. 자세한 것은 블랙리버 연구원 정도가 되어야 잘 설명해줄 수 있을 터이니 생략하겠네.

1000687903.english: Think of it as my range and depth of experience having grown even further.
1000687903.korean: 한층 더 경험의 폭과 깊이가 넓어지고 깊어졌다고 생각하면 되네.

1000687904.english: Now, Setting that aside—since I became flight commander, the squadron commander's seat has naturally been left vacant…
1000687904.korean: 자, 이 이야기는 차치하고. 내가 비행단장이 되면서 저절로 비행전대장 자리가 공석이 되었으니…

1000687907.english: From now on, you'll be the squadron commander.

1000687910.english: The squadron commander is also the one who leads us.

1000687911.english: I don't mean to belittle P-49 Sleipnir, but…

1000687912.english: In my opinion, isn't she lacking the qualifications for such an important role?
1000687912.korean: 그런 중요한 자리에 슬레이프니르는 자질이 부족하지 않나 하는 것이 저의 의견입니다.

1000687913.english: Hmm… I can see why you'd think that.

1000687915.english: If someone else were made squadron commander, could they handle P-49 Sleipnir as their subordinate?
1000687915.korean: 다른 대원이 전대장 자리를 맡았을 때 부하인 슬레이프니르를 감당 가능하겠나?

1000687916.english: By process of elimination, P-49 Sleipnir does seem like the best choice.

1000687917.english: Wait, why does this feel like some kind of strange riddle!?

1000687920.english: Ugh… I don't think it is my imagination, though.
1000687920.korean: 으으… 기분 탓이 아닌 거 같은데.

1000687921.english: And if it isn't, does it really matter?

1000687922.english: Your taking on such an important role hasn't changed, and the other comrades will support you.
1000687922.korean: 자네가 중책을 맡았다는 건 변함이 없고, 다른 동료들이 자네를 도와줄 터인데.

1000687923.english: What matters more is how you move forward from here, isn't it?
1000687923.korean: 앞으로 어떻게 할 지가 더 중요한 것 아니겠나?

1000687924.english: Now, we should hold a party to celebrate your return, as well as the new flight commander and squadron commander.
1000687924.korean: 자, 귀대 기념 및 새로운 비행단장과 비행전대장을 위한 파티를 열어야하지 않겠나.

1000687925.english: For just today, let's forget everything else and eat, drink, and enjoy ourselves.
1000687925.korean: 오늘 하루 정도는 모두 잊고 즐겁게 먹고 마시세.

1000687928.english: Ah—no, now you're the flight commander.

1000687933.english: Oh, because of the former flight commander?

1000687934.english: …Other than offering our condolences, what else can we do?
1000687934.korean: ……명복을 비는 것 외에는 우리가 할 수 있는 일이 있겠나.

1000687939.english: I don't know what you're saying.

1000687941.english: It's just… you're not like you used to be…

1000687942.english: Did something unpleasant happen during your modification?
1000687942.korean: 혹시 개조 때 안 좋은 일이라도 당하셨나요?

1000687943.english: You've been through a lot, so it's understandable if you feel different from before.
1000687943.korean: 이런저런 일을 많이 겪었으니 충분히 옛날과 다르게 느껴질 수도 있겠지.

1000687944.english: Thank you for your concern. But don't worry. No matter what I go through, even as Uroborus of Reincarnation, I am still myself.
1000687944.korean: 걱정해 줘서 고맙네. 하지만 걱정하지 말게. 어떤 일을 겪든, 윤회의 우로보로스가 되어도 나는 나이니 말일세.

1000687945.english: Now, now. Let's leave the heavy talk here. Smile. Isn't this a gathering to celebrate something joyful?
1000687945.korean: 자, 자. 분위기 무거워지는 이야기는 여기까지. 자 웃으세. 즐거운 일을 축하하기 위한 자리 아니던가.

1000687946.english: Hehe, if P-29 Lindwurm laughs wholeheartedly, everyone will fall for her, won't they?
1000687946.korean: 히히, 린티가 진심으로 웃어버리면 모두가 린티에게 빠져버릴 텐데요?

1000687947.english: Don't worry—I've already fallen for P-29 Lindwurm, after all.
1000687947.korean: 걱정말게, 나는 이미 린티에게 빠져 있으니 말일세.

1000687949.english: If something is bothering you, please tell us.

1000687950.english: We all trust the squadron… flight commander.

1000687953.english: I thought I had hidden it well…

1000687954.english: I never want to experience death… again.

1000687955.english: As Uroborus, I became far more efficient and swift in command than I was as Phyton.
1000687955.korean: 우로보로스가 된 나는 피톤일 때보다 훨씬 효율적이고 신속하게 지휘를 할 수 있게 되었다네.

1000687956.english: Of course—after all, I now have the experience to avoid the worst possible choices.
1000687956.korean: 당연하겠지 최악의 선택지는 피할 수 있는 경험이 생겼으니 말일세.

1000687957.english: But even if only we avoided the worst choices, the overall situation did not improve.
1000687957.korean: 하지만 우리만 최악의 선택지를 피한다고 하더라도 전황이 나아지는 것은 아니었네.

1000687958.english: And though it wasn't the worst, our losses kept accumulating…
1000687958.korean: 그리고 최악만 아니었을 뿐 우리들의 피해는 점점 누적되었지…

1000687959.english: The Iron Bug possessed overwhelming force, and skillfully picked off humans one by one, preventing us from receiving proper orders.
1000687959.korean: 철충은 압도적인 전력을 가지고 있었고, 노련하게 인간들을 노려 그 수를 착실하게 줄여서 우리들이 제대로 된 명령을 받지 못하게 했으니 말일세.

1000687960.english: And with the Hypnos Disease—an unknown mechanism—spreading, what could we do?
1000687960.korean: 그리고 휩노스 병이라는 기작이 밝혀지지 않은 질병까지 유행하니 별도리가 있는가?

1000687961.english: Still, we fought. To protect humans who had little time left and who were not destined to live long.
1000687961.korean: 그래도 우리는 싸웠다네. 얼마 남지도 않고, 오래 살지도 못할 인간들을 지키기 위해서.

1000687962.english: Even so… we could not prevent the extinction of humanity.
1000687962.korean: 그래도… 우리는 인간의 멸종을 막지 못했다네.

1000687963.english: After Amina Jones fell and Rock Harbor collapsed… we resisted for a long time.
1000687963.korean: 아미나 존스가 쓰러지고 락 하버가 무너진 이후에도... 우리는 한참을 더 저항했다네.

1000687964.english: And… the unit nearly reached total annihilation.

1000687970.english: The only ones left are… you, me, P-22 Harpyia, and P-49 Sleipnir.
1000687970.korean: 남은 건, 나와 자네와 하르페이아, 슬레이프니르뿐인가.

1000687971.english: Take the other members and retreat.

1000687972.english: If it's just the two of you, you should be able to break through the Iron Bug' encirclement.
1000687972.korean: 자네들뿐이라면 충분히 철충의 포위망을 뚫을 수 있겠지.

1000687975.english: In this situation, command won't mean much, will it?
1000687975.korean: 이런 상황에서 지휘는 큰 의미가 없겠지.

1000687976.english: All that's needed are firepower, speed, and a way to evade the enemy's attacks.
1000687976.korean: 화력과 속도 그리고 적의 공격을 회피할 수단만 있으면 된다네.

1000687977.english: I can't provide any of those.
1000687977.korean: 나는 그 어느 것도 충족시키지 못하지.

1000687978.english: Wouldn't it be better for one of you to draw the Iron Bug' attention, increasing the survival chances of the other three, rather than having all four die while trying to escape?
1000687978.korean: 네 명 모두가 탈출하려다가 전부 죽는 것보다는 하나가 철충의 시선을 끌어서 다른 세 명의 생존확률을 올리는 것이 좋지 않겠나?

1000687980.english: Do you remember what we talked about during our first meeting?
1000687980.korean: 우리가 처음으로 면담했던 때에 했던 말을 기억하나?

1000687981.english: Speed is important, but direction matters too.

1000687983.english: Which way is the right direction now?

1000687987.english: I've scouted the path with the weakest anti-air defenses.

1000687988.english: I'll share it with you now.

1000687990.english: Harpe… everyone shares the same somber mood.

1000687992.english: If you all survive, my life will feel worthwhile.
1000687992.korean: 자네들이 살아남으면 내 삶도 보람찰 것 같군.

1000687994.english: As a precaution, I'll say this—let's skip any gloomy farewells!

1000687995.english: Don't leave a lingering sense of unease behind!

1000687996.english: Forgot? I am Uroborus of Reincarnation. Even if I die, I will be reborn!
1000687996.korean: 잊었나? 나는 윤회의 우로보로스일세. 죽어도 다시 부활한다네!

1000687997.english: Don't forget—the new me remembers everything until the very end!
1000687997.korean: 새로운 나는 마지막의 마지막까지 기억한다는 것을 잊지 말게!

1000687999.english: Next time, we'll watch the final episode of Magical Girl Magical Momo together.
1000687999.korean: 다음에 마법소녀 매지컬 모모 마지막 화까지 같이 보도록 하지요.

1000688000.english: I haven't even finished half of it yet!?

1000688002.english: The movie version isn't included, after all.

1000688003.english: A day or two won't be enough.

1000688005.english: I'll build up my stamina so I won't fall behind the others.
1000688005.korean: 다른 애들한테 뒤지지 않게 체력을 길러놓을게요.

1000688006.english: You speak as if doing what's necessary is some kind of favor!
1000688006.korean: 당연히 해야 하는 일을 선심 쓴다는 식으로 말하는군!

1000688008.english: But in times like these, wouldn't it be better to boldly say that no one will be able to follow you?
1000688008.korean: 하지만 이런 때에는 호기롭게 누구도 따라오지 못하게 하겠다고 말하는 쪽이 좋지 않겠나?

1000688010.english: Hey, I'm here, so that won't work.

1000688011.english: Haha, if you let your guard down, someone might catch up.

1000688014.english: By secretly tampering with your equipment.

1000688015.english: If you did that, it would be a massive disaster!?

1000688016.english: Hehe, it's a lesson to never neglect equipment maintenance.
1000688016.korean: 후후, 장비 관리를 게을리하지 말라는 가르침일세.

1000688017.english: Alright! Now, let's go! There's no time!

1000688020.english: You know I'm not very patient, right?
1000688020.korean: 나는 인내심 별로 없는 거 알지?

1000688021.english: You have to return quickly, Uroborus.

1000688027.english: Even if the new me is restored, it's only another being carrying my memories…
1000688027.korean: 새로운 내가 복원된다고 하더라도 그건 나의 기억을 가진 다른 존재일뿐인데…

1000688028.english: The current me will die, and that's the end…

1000688029.english: But! For everyone living on this earth, sooner or later, death comes.
1000688029.korean: 허나! 지상에 살아있는 모든 이에게는 늦든 빠르든 죽음은 찾아온다.

1000688030.english: Then, is there any death greater than facing a formidable enemy for those who gave you life, those who cherish you?
1000688030.korean: 그러면 날 살게 해준 이들, 나를 소중히 여겨주는 이들을 위해 강적에 맞서는 것 이상의 죽음이 또 있을까.

1000688031.english: …Having a lot of experience isn't necessarily a good thing.
1000688031.korean: ……경험이 많다는 게 꼭 좋은 것만은 아니구먼.

1000688032.english: Even at times like this, I try to quote someone else rather than speak for myself…
1000688032.korean: 이런 때에도 자기가 아니라 다른 이의 말을 인용하려고 하니…

1000688033.english: Even if it's clumsy, at times like this I must speak my own words.
1000688033.korean: 조잡하더라도 이런 때에는 나의 말을 해야겠지.

1000688034.english: I will pass this on to my next self.

1000688038.english: The flight commander who loved and cared for us!

1000688039.english: P/A-00 Griffon, braver than anyone when it comes to protecting others!

1000688040.english: P-29 Lindwurm, who loved herself and, just as much, her comrades!
1000688040.korean: 자신을 사랑하고, 그만큼 동료들을 사랑하던 린티를!

1000688041.english: P/A-8 Blackhound, gentler than anyone and always caring for others!
1000688041.korean: 누구보다도 상냥하고 남을 잘 돌봐주던 블랙 하운드를!

1000688042.english: P-22 Harpyia, whose deep and broad wisdom guided us through hardships!
1000688042.korean: 깊고 넓은 지혜로 고난을 넘게 해주었던 하르페이아를!

1000688043.english: EB-48G Hraesvelgr, who never held back for the sake of his comrades!
1000688043.korean: 동료들을 위해서 자신을 아끼지 않았던 흐레스벨그를!

1000688044.english: P-49 Sleipnir, who led the way and pioneered the roughest paths!
1000688044.korean: 누구보다도 앞장서서 험한 길을 개척하던 슬레이프니르를!

1000688046.english: You can forget everything else, it doesn't matter!

1000688047.english: As long as I remember those who truly gave me life, I will never die!
1000688047.korean: 나를 진실로 살게 해준 이들을 기억한다면 나는 결코 죽지 않는다네!

1000688048.english: Not because I am Uroborus of Reincarnation,

1000688049.english: But because I am Uroborus of the Sky Knights!

1000688050.english: Now! This is the last flight of this life!

1000688052.english: P/A-00 Griffon. P-29 Lindwurm. Have you eaten?

1000688054.english: Are you hungry? Well, then I have no choice. I'll give you the special cookies P-29 Lindwurm saved just for you.
1000688054.korean: 혹시 배고픈 거야? 그러면 어쩔 수 없네. 린티가 특별히 아껴 둔 쿠키줄게.

1000688055.english: No, no, no. If you haven't eaten yet, eat this. Quickly.
1000688055.korean: 아냐아냐아냐. 아직 밥 안 먹었으면 이거 먹어. 빨리.

1000688056.english: Ugh. This is a field ration. It's not mealtime, why suddenly this?
1000688056.korean: 윽. 이거 야전 간편식이잖아. 식사시간도 아닌데 갑자기 이건 왜?

1000688060.english: But what does this have to do with the field rations?

1000688061.english: I'll explain that later, for now just fill your stomach.
1000688061.korean: 그건 나중에 설명해줄테니까 지금은 배부터 채워.

1000688062.english: But P-29 Lindwurm has never actually met the flight commander…
1000688062.korean: 그런데 린티는 비행단장님 실제로 본 적이 없는데……

1000688063.english: What kind of person is she?

1000688064.english: Hmm… you can get some idea from old records.
1000688064.korean: 음… 옛 자료에서 어느 정도는 봤지?

1000688065.english: She was excellent at both administration and command, and took good care of us in many ways.
1000688065.korean: 행정이든 지휘든 훌륭하게 해내신 분이셨고, 우리를 여러모로 잘 챙겨주셨어.

1000688066.english: I see, but is there a reason we're suddenly eating field rations?
1000688066.korean: 그건 알겠는데 우리가 갑자기 야전식을 먹는 데에는 이유가 있어?

1000688067.english: Sometimes… good intentions can be more frightening than evil.
1000688067.korean: 때로는… 악의보다 선의가 더 무서울 때가 있거든.

1000688069.english: If your stomach growls in front of the flight commander, you'll get a taste of hell.
1000688069.korean: 비행단장님 앞에서 배라도 꼬르륵거리면 지옥을 맛보게 될 테니까.

1000688070.english: By the way, have you seen EB-48G Hraesvelgr?

1000688071.english: I heard she had business in the audiovisual room?

1000688073.english: She went to keep her promise.

1000688075.english: Is there anything more you want to hear?

1000688076.english: If your business is finished, may I ask one favor?
1000688076.korean: 혹 용무가 끝났다면 한 가지 부탁을 해도 되나?

1000688077.english: Could you have my clothes newly tailored?
1000688077.korean: 내 옷을 새로 맞춰줄 수 있겠나?

1000688078.english: That's right. These clothes are from when I was Phyton.
1000688078.korean: 그렇다네. 이 옷은 내가 피톤일 때의 옷이라네.

1000688079.english: I was never ashamed of being Phyton, but when I became Uroborus, it was right in the middle of the War of Destruction, so there was no time to get new clothes.
1000688079.korean: 내가 피톤이었던 것을 부끄러워한 적은 없지만 내가 우로보로스가 된 때가 멸망 전쟁이 한창이던 시기라 새 옷을 받을 겨를이 없었다네.

1000688080.english: New wine should be put in new bottles, shouldn't it?
1000688080.korean: 새 술은 새 부대에 담아야하는 법 아니겠나.

1000688081.english: I don't know exactly what that means, but if there are spare resources, that's a good thing.
1000688081.korean: 그게 무슨 말인지는 모르겠지만 예비 자원이 있으면 좋은 일이겠지.

1000688082.english: —Though it's more than just a "spare"… no need to go into detail, I suppose.
1000688082.korean: - 예비 정도가 아니긴 한데… 구태여 말할 필요는 없겠지?

1000688083.english: If there's nothing more to say, may I be going?
1000688083.korean: 더 할 말이 없다면 이만 가봐도 되겠나?

1000688084.english: The faces I can never forget, even in death, are waiting for me.
1000688084.korean: 죽어도 잊지 못할 얼굴들이 기다리고 있구먼.

1000688085.english: May I go to catch up with old comrades?

1000688086.english: —As I nodded, Uroborus ran smiling toward the faces she could never forget… the Sky Knights.
1000688086.korean: - 내가 고개를 끄덕이자 우로보로스는 죽어도 잊지 못할 얼굴들… 스카이 나이츠 대원들을 향해 웃으면서 달려갔다.

1000688088.english: I hereby report the return of the Sky Knights' flight commander, Uroborus of Reincarnation!
1000688088.korean: 스카이 나이츠 비행단장 윤회의 우로보로스 복귀를 신고하겠네!

1000688089.english: I'll ask later if I remember.

1000688092.english: Got it. Anyway, there's enough fabric left.

1000688093.english: You called me like this at bedtime, so I wondered what was going on... You were preparing a surprise like this? Honestly... I was so happy that I almost mistook it for a dream. To prove this isn't a dream, and to commemorate this moment... will you give me a kiss?
1000688093.korean: 잘 시간에 이렇게 부르길래 무슨 일인가 했더니... 이런 이벤트를 준비하고 있었어? 나 참, 정말이지... 너무 행복해서, 순간 꿈으로 착각할 뻔 했잖아. 꿈이 아니라는 걸 증명하기 위해, 그리고 이 순간을 기념하기 위해... 키스, 해 줄래?

1000688094.english: In the end, isn't the most important thing in a Wraith where you finish? In that sense, you are truly amazing, Commander. You have never once missed first place in my heart. So, for the winner of Wraith, I will give you something more honorable than any medal or trophy. It is my love. I love you, darling.
1000688094.korean: 레이스에서 가장 중요한 건, 결국 몇 등으로 들어오는지 아니겠어? 그런 의미에서 사령관은 참 대단해. 내 마음 속에서 1등을 놓친 적이 단 한 번도 없거든. 그럼, 레이스의 승리자를 위해 그 어떤 메달이나 트로피보다 영예로운 걸 줄게. 바로 내 사랑이야. 사랑해, 달링.

1000688095.english: A boss with no blood or tears. That's me. But strangely... Whenever I stand in front of you, I become a shy girl. Because the sound of my pounding heart was embarrassing, I pretended to be scary to hide it... You won't need to do that anymore. So, please take good care of the girl who loves you. My... Darling.
1000688095.korean: 피도 눈물도 없는 보스. 그게 바로 나야. 하지만 이상하게... 당신 앞에만 서면 수줍은 소녀가 되어버려. 두근대는 심장소리가 부끄러워서, 그걸 감추기 위해 무서운 모습을 연기했는데... 더는 그럴 필요가 없겠네. 그러니, 당신을 사랑하는 소녀를 잘 부탁해. 나의... 달링.

1000688096.english: T-13 Alvis says bodyguards should never fall in love. They say it's hard to provide proper security when you're in love. But how could that be possible? Every time I see the commander, I fall in love all over again. So, please let me provide proper security... Please stay right by my side.
1000688096.korean: 알비스가 그러는데, 보디가드는 절대 사랑에 빠지면 안된다고 하더라고요. 사랑에 빠지면 제대로 경호를 하기가 어렵다고. 그런데 어떻게 그럴 수 있겠어요? 사령관을 볼 때마다 매번 새롭게 사랑에 빠지는데요. 그러니, 제가 경호를 제대로 할 수 있도록... 제 곁에 꼭 붙어 있어 주세요.

1000688097.english: When purchasing the next skin and gifting it to the target combatant, the background will be activated.&n Leona of Blood and Iron Dragon "Dreamweaver Modern Collection: La Madrina"
1000688097.korean: 다음 스킨 구매 및 대상 전투원에게 선물 시, 배경이 활성화 됩니다.&n철혈의 레오나 용 "드림위버 모던 컬렉션 : 라 마드리나"

1000688098.english: That is so. This one planned all this out of a wish to give you the finest school days possible. How was it — your school days with this one? Were you happy? Has this one's love for you been conveyed well? No, there is no need to even ask. Seeing you offer a ring to this one like this... hehe.
1000688098.korean: 그렇다. 첩은 그대를 위한 최고의 학창시절을 만들어주고 싶어 이번 일을 계획한 것이다. 어땠느냐, 첩과 함께하는 학창시절은? 즐거웠느냐? 그대를 향한 첩의 사랑이 잘 전해졌느냐? 아니, 물어볼 필요도 없었겠구나. 이렇게 첩에게 반지를 건네는 것을 보면... 후후.

1000688099.english: In Norse mythology, C-33 Andvari, the dwarf, valued the ring more than any other treasure. For different reasons, but... I will also cherish this ring you gave me, Commander, more than anything else. Because this is...  Because it's proof that the commander I love the most in the world likes me back.
1000688099.korean: 신화 속에 나오는 안드바리는 다른 어떤 보물보다도 반지를 가장 중요하게 여겼다고 해요. 이유는 다르지만... 저도 사령관님이 주신 이 반지를 그 어떤 것보다도 소중히 할게요. 왜냐면 이건... 제가 세상에서 제일 좋아하는 사령관님이, 저를 좋아해 주신다는 증거니까요.

1000688100.english: Heh~ Coach, were you looking at me like that? Hehe, just kidding. I was eagerly waiting for when you would confess. You know what, Coach? The arena of life is too vast for me to run it on an empty stomach. So... Will you play doubles with me in the game of life? Love all! The game between the coach and me starts now!
1000688100.korean: 헤에~ 코치, 그런 눈으로 날 바라보고 있었어? 헤헤, 농담. 언제 고백하나 열심히 기다리고 있었지. 그거 알아, 코치? 단식으로 뛰기에는 삶이란 경기장이 나에게는 너무 넓어. 그러니... 나랑 같이 복식으로 삶이란 경기장에서 뛰어줄래? 러브 올! 코치와 나의 경기는 지금부터야!

1000688102.english: Ah, there you are, Princess True Ancestor.

1000688103.english: Huh, City Guard! What brings you here? I haven't done anything this time!
1000688103.korean: 헉, 시티가드! 무슨 일로 찾아온 것이냐! 이번에는 아직 아무 짓도 안 했는데!

1000688104.english: "Yet," you say… so you're full of plans to cause trouble again, huh…
1000688104.korean: ‘아직’이라는 거 보니까, 또 사고 칠 생각으로 아주 가득하구만...

1000688105.english: Well, still, since you haven't caused trouble "yet," you don't need to worry about getting scolded "yet."
1000688105.korean: 뭐, 그래도 ‘아직은’ 사고 안 쳤으니까, ‘아직은’ 혼날 걱정 안 해도 돼.

1000688107.english: Of course. I came to ask where T-13 Alvis is right now. You know where he is, right?
1000688107.korean: 그럼. 지금은 알비스가 어디 있는지 물어보러 왔거든. 어디 있는지 알고 있지?

1000688108.english: You mean True Ancestor's white beast? Of course I know…
1000688108.korean: 진조의 하얀 야수 말이냐? 물론 알고 있지...

1000688109.english: Wait, are you trying to get me to betray my comrades?
1000688109.korean: 잠깐, 혹시, 짐에게 동료를 밀고하라고 하는 것이냐?

1000688110.english: No, this time I came to give praise.
1000688110.korean: 아니, 이번에는 칭찬을 하려고 온 거야.

1000688111.english: I came because of this. The Honorary City Guard Medal for T-13 Alvis.
1000688111.korean: 이거 때문에 온 거거든. 알비스한테 주는 명예 시티가드 훈장.

1000688112.english: Oh… it looks amazing! I want one too! Me too!
1000688112.korean: 오오... 멋지게 생겼다! 나도! 나도 가지고 싶어!

1000688113.english: But to get it, I guess I need to do something good first, right?
1000688113.korean: 그러려면 먼저 뭔가 착한 일을 해야겠지?

1000688114.english: Hmm… then… that's right! I gave the Commander a shoulder massage last time!
1000688114.korean: 으음… 그러면… 맞아! 저번에 사령관 어깨 안마해줬어!

1000688115.english: Haha, that's pretty convincing. I'll consider it during the evaluation later.
1000688115.korean: 하하, 그건 꽤 그럴듯하네. 나중에 심사할 때 고려하도록 할게.

1000688116.english: Really? I can look forward to it?

1000688117.english: If you behave well until Christmas.

1000688119.english: But why is T-13 Alvis receiving a medal?
1000688119.korean: 그런데 알비스는 왜 훈장을 받는 거야?

1000688120.english: T-13 Alvis helped C-33 Andvari before and caught someone who had broken into the warehouse together.
1000688120.korean: 알비스가 예전에 안드바리를 도와서 같이 창고에 침입한 사람을 잡았거든?

1000688121.english: She's being awarded the medal in recognition of that achievement.
1000688121.korean: 그 때의 공로를 인정받아서 훈장을 수여하는 거야.

1000688122.english: I'm hearing this story for the first time…?

1000688123.english: Explain it to me in more detail!

1000688124.english: Hmm, actually, I was busy with something else at that time, so I don't know the details of that incident…
1000688124.korean: 흐음, 사실 내가 그 때는 다른 일을 하고 있었기 때문에, 그 사건에 대해서 자세히는 모르는데…

1000688125.english: Why don't you ask the two detectives who investigated the case directly?
1000688125.korean: 나한테 물어보지 말고, 사건을 수사한 두 탐정들한테 직접 들어보지 그래?

1000688127.english: Good! Then let's go and hear the story right away!
1000688127.korean: 좋다! 그렇다면 바로 가서 이야기를 듣도록 하자꾸나!

1000688128.english: Hmm, so you came here just to hear that story!
1000688128.korean: 흐음, 그 이야기가 듣고 싶어서 찾아왔다는 말이지!

1000688129.english: But I can't tell you with an empty stomach! T-13 Alvis is now a righteous and trustworthy Choco Guard!
1000688129.korean: 하지만 맨입으로는 말해줄 수 없어! 알비스는 지금 정의롭고 믿음직스러운 초코가드니까!

1000688130.english: If you want T-13 Alvis to open his mouth, first you'll need the finest chocolate made by Aurora-nee!
1000688130.korean: 알비스의 입을 열고 싶다면, 일단 아우로라 언니가 만든 최고급 초콜릿을…

1000688132.english: Isn't it a contradiction to claim you're righteous and then take a bribe?
1000688132.korean: 방금 정의롭다고 해 놓고 뇌물을 받는 건 모순되지 않느냐!

1000688134.english: Hahaha, well, it's all to make a living, so getting a little chocolate isn't so bad.
1000688134.korean: 하핫, 뭐 다 먹고 살자고 하는 일인데, 초콜릿 정도야 받을 수도 있지.

1000688135.english: But since the chocolate made by Aurora is too expensive, please make do with this chocolate bar. This is also a high-quality product in its own way.
1000688135.korean: 하지만 아우로라가 만든 초콜릿은 너무 비싸니까, 이 초코바로 참아 달라고. 이것도 나름 고급품이야.

1000688136.english: Hehe, then where should I start the story…
1000688136.korean: 후후, 그러면 어디부터 이야기를 해 줄까…

1000688137.english: Right. I guess we can start from here.

1000688138.english: So, why did T-13 Alvis receive this medal…?
1000688138.korean: 자, 그래서 알비스가 왜 이 훈장을 받게 되었냐면….

1000688139.english: Do you remember the incident where part of the warehouse wall collapsed due to a recent attack by the Iron Bug?
1000688139.korean: 최근 철충의 공격 때문에 창고 벽이 일부 무너진 사건 기억해?

1000688140.english: That was quite a big deal.

1000688141.english: C-33 Andvari was investigating to see if any resources were lost because of that incident.
1000688141.korean: 안드바리는 그 사건 때문에 자원이 없어지진 않았는지 조사하고 있었어.

1000688142.english: Since the warehouse walls and doors were damaged by the attack, C-33 Andvari asked Azaz to repair the warehouse.
1000688142.korean: 창고의 벽이랑 문이 공격 때문에 부서졌기 때문에, 안드바리는 아자즈 씨에게 부탁해서 창고를 수리했지.

1000688143.english: In the process, C-33 Andvari decided to upgrade the warehouse door to a slightly better one…
1000688143.korean: 그 과정에서 안드바리는 창고의 문을 조금 더 좋은 문으로 바꾸기로 했어…

1000688144.english: (Fortunately, the material loss wasn't that bad. This shouldn't be a big problem.)
1000688144.korean: (다행히 물자 손실이 그렇게 크진 않았어. 이 정도면 큰 문제는 없겠다.)

1000688145.english: (Then the organization of the materials is done… now we just need to repair the doors and walls damaged by the attack.)
1000688145.korean: (그럼 물자들 정리는 이걸로 끝났고… 이제 공격으로 파괴된 문이랑 벽 수리만 끝나면 되겠다.)

1000688146.english: (But that's strange, Azaz said it would take about ten minutes… yet it's taking longer than expected.)
1000688146.korean: (그런데 이상하다, 아자즈 씨가 분명 십 분 정도면 끝난다고 하셨는데… 생각보다 오래 걸리네.)

1000688147.english: Azaz, how much of the internal repairs are finished?
1000688147.korean: 아자즈 씨, 혹시 내부 수리는 얼마나 끝났을까요?

1000688151.english: What are you thinking about that you're not even answering?
1000688151.korean: 무슨 생각 하길래 대답도 안 하고 있는 거야?

1000688152.english: Ah, sorry. I was just thinking.

1000688153.korean: 네? 무, 무슨 문제가 있는 건가요?

1000688154.english: I was wondering if we should paint it gold.

1000688155.english: Gold…?! What do you mean by that?

1000688156.english: Since we're repairing it anyway, wouldn't it look great if we painted the door gold?
1000688156.korean: 기왕 새로 수리한 김에 문을 황금색으로 칠하면 멋지지 않겠어요?

1000688158.english: Hmm, well… repainting it is fine, but…
1000688158.korean: 으음, 그게… 도색을 새로 하는 건 상관없지만…

1000688159.english: Y-Yeah, I think it's better to do it a few days later. Today we need to finish the interior work of the warehouse.
1000688159.korean: 여, 역시 며칠 뒤에 하는 편이 좋을 것 같네요. 오늘은 창고 내부 작업을 마무리해야 해서요.

1000688160.english: …You don't have to answer so diligently.
1000688160.korean: ...너무 그렇게 성실하게 대답 안 해도 괜찮아.

1000688162.english: It's unfortunate we couldn't paint it today, but all the other work is done.
1000688162.korean: 오늘 도색을 못 한 건 안타깝지만, 다른 작업은 다 끝내놨어요.

1000688163.english: We installed the top-grade security system, the same one used for the Commander's visits, so unless someone breaks the doors or walls, no one can get in.
1000688163.korean: 사령관의 방문에도 쓰이는 최고 등급 보안 시스템을 적용했으니, 문이나 벽을 부수지 않는 이상 누가 들어가진 못할 거예요.

1000688164.english: Ah, thank you! Then I can leave work today feeling at ease!
1000688164.korean: 아, 감사합니다! 그러면 오늘은 이만 마음 편히 퇴근할 수 있겠네요!

1000688166.english: Yes. I need to do the homework Alexandra of Resonance gave me, write in my sketch diary…
1000688166.korean: 네. 알렉산드라 선생님이 내주신 숙제도 하고, 그림일기도 쓰고…

1000688167.english: And take care of the things I couldn't do while organizing the warehouse.
1000688167.korean: 그 동안 창고를 정리하느라 하지 못했던 일들을 해야죠.

1000688169.english: Ah, no! I'm just doing what needs to be done…
1000688169.korean: 아, 아니에요! 그냥 해야 할 일을 하는 것뿐인데요…

1000688170.english: You don't have to be so modest. Isn't doing what needs to be done on time considered diligence?
1000688170.korean: 너무 그렇게 겸손하지 않아도 괜찮아. 해야 할 일을 제때 하는 걸 성실하다고 하는 거 아니겠어?

1000688174.english: Well then, since I'm done here, I'll be off. I need to upgrade Tommy Walker for the refugee shelter construction.
1000688174.korean: 그럼, 이쪽 일은 끝났으니 전 이만 가볼게요. 난민 숙소 건설 때문에 토미워커를 업그레이드해야 하거든요.

1000688175.english: C-33 Andvari, have a good day.

1000688176.english: Phew… Anyway, you worked hard. I'll be off too.
1000688176.korean: 으휴… 아무튼, 고생 많았어. 나도 이만 가 볼게.

1000688177.english: Don't just do homework, make sure to rest!
1000688177.korean: 너무 숙제만 하지 말고, 푹 쉬어!

1000688179.english: (Hehe, since Deconstructor Azaz helped out… now LRL and T-13 Alvis won't be able to enter the warehouse at will.)
1000688179.korean: (후후, 아자즈 씨가 도와주셨으니… 이제 LRL도, 알비스 언니도 함부로 창고에 못 들어오겠지.)

1000688180.english: (Now the daily task of checking the number of chocolate bars and tuna cans is finally over.)
1000688180.korean: (이제 매일 아침 초코바와 참치캔 수량을 조사하는 일도 끝이구나.)

1000688181.english: (Then, I'll just lock the warehouse door and leave…)
1000688181.korean: (그럼, 이제 바로 창고 문을 잠그고 퇴근을…)

1000688182.english: Ah, wait a moment! C-33 Andvari, please wait a moment.
1000688182.korean: 아, 잠시만요! 안드바리 양, 잠깐만 기다려 주세요.

1000688183.english: Alpha? Cardinal Armand? What brings you here?
1000688183.korean: 알파 님? 아르망 언니? 무슨 일이신가요?

1000688184.english: Phew, luckily we're not late. The reason we came is…
1000688184.korean: 휴, 다행히 늦지 않았네요. 저희가 온 건 다름이 아니라…

1000688185.english: We're here to retrieve His Majesty's command panel.

1000688187.english: Yes. Recently, after a meeting with Doctor, Daphne, and our secretarial staff…
1000688187.korean: 네. 최근 닥터와 다프네 씨, 그리고 저희 비서진들이 회의한 결과…

1000688188.english: To protect Master's health, we concluded that Master should take a break from work for a while.
1000688188.korean: 주인님의 건강을 지키기 위해서는, 주인님께서 잠시 업무에서 손을 놓고 휴식을 취하셔야 한다는 결론을 내렸어요.

1000688189.english: …That's right. The Commander never rests once work begins.
1000688189.korean: …그렇죠. 사령관님은 한 번 일을 시작하시면 끝낼 때까지 쉬지 않으시는 분이니까요.

1000688190.english: Lately, the workload has increased quite a bit too.
1000688190.korean: 요즘 또 업무가 부쩍 늘어나기도 하셨고요.

1000688191.english: However, Master doesn't seem to consider taking a break at all…
1000688191.korean: 하지만, 주인님께서는 도통 업무를 놓을 생각을 안 하셔서…

1000688192.english: …so you attempted to sneak into our quarters to find the command panel.
1000688192.korean: …지휘 패널을 찾기 위해 저희 숙소에 잠입을 시도하시더군요.

1000688193.english: Fortunately, you were discovered by the companion team before finding the panel and were pulled away, but since we know Your Majesty well, and Your Majesty knows us well…
1000688193.korean: 다행히 패널을 찾기 전에 컴패니언 대원들에게 발각되어 끌려가셨지만, 저희가 폐하를 잘 아는 만큼, 폐하께서도 저희를 잘 아시는 터라…

1000688194.english: It's only a matter of time before the location where the panel is hidden is discovered.
1000688194.korean: 패널을 숨겨둔 장소가 발각되는 건 시간문제입니다.

1000688195.english: That's why, while looking for a safe place to store this panel, we heard that C-33 Andvari recently repaired the warehouse door, so we came here.
1000688195.korean: 그래서 이 패널을 보관할 장소를 찾다가, 안드바리 양이 최근 창고 문을 수리했다는 소식을 듣고 이렇게 찾아오게 되었어요.

1000688196.english: Hmm… understood. If it's for the Commander's health, I'll cooperate too!
1000688196.korean: 음… 알겠습니다. 사령관님의 건강을 위해서라면, 저도 협력할게요!

1000688197.english: Then, where should we store the panel…

1000688198.english: Ah, Section E4 would be good. It's where the chocolate bar boxes are, the place I check every day.
1000688198.korean: 아, E4 구역이 좋겠네요. 초코바 상자가 있는 곳이라, 제가 매일 체크하는 곳이거든요.

1000688199.english: I'll manage the panel carefully, so both of you can rest assured!
1000688199.korean: 패널은 제가 잘 관리하고 있을 테니까, 두 분 다 안심하세요!

1000688200.english: Hehe, very reliable. Thank you, C-33 Andvari.

1000688201.english: Shall I pay the storage fee with the newly released cream cup tteokbokki?
1000688201.korean: 보관료는 새로 나온 크림 컵떡볶이면 될까요?

1000688203.english: But then that would be too shameless, wouldn't it? I caught you before leaving work.
1000688203.korean: 그러면 너무 염치가 없잖아요? 퇴근하기 전에 붙잡은 건데.

1000688204.english: Hehe… thank you. I've actually been wanting to try it!
1000688204.korean: 헤헤… 감사합니다. 안 그래도 한 번 먹어보고 싶었던 건데!

1000688205.english: I'll enjoy it together with my sisters!

1000688206.english: That cream cup tteokbokki was really delicious…

1000688207.english: Hmm. Suddenly I want to eat it again. LRL, shall we go eat tteokbokki later?
1000688207.korean: 으음. 갑자기 또 먹고 싶네. LRL, 이따가 떡볶이 먹으러 갈래?

1000688209.english: It's a good idea, but shouldn't we focus on the story for now?
1000688209.korean: 좋은 생각이긴 하지만, 지금은 얘기에 집중하는 편이 좋지 않을까?

1000688210.english: It'd be a problem if the story drifts elsewhere already.
1000688210.korean: 이야기가 벌써부터 다른 곳으로 새면 곤란하다구.

1000688211.english: Right…! So, why did they receive that medal? I'm curious!
1000688211.korean: 맞다…! 그래서 그 훈장은 왜 받은 건데! 궁금하단 말이다!

1000688212.english: Ahaha, right. That's what we were talking about.

1000688213.english: Well… it was because of something that happened a few days after C-33 Andvari modified the warehouse door!
1000688213.korean: 그건 말이지… 안드바리가 창고 문을 개조하고 나서 며칠 뒤에 벌어진 일 때문이었어!

1000688215.english: Well, good work on today's mission too, T-9 Gremlin!
1000688215.korean: 그럼, 오늘 임무도 수고하세요, 그렘린 언니!

1000688216.english: Then, I'll also carefully check the supplies…

1000688219.english: I clearly closed the warehouse door yesterday before leaving…
1000688219.korean: 분명 어제 창고 문을 닫아 놓고 갔는데…

1000688220.english: (What happened? This is the door Mr. Deconstructor Azaz designed. It shouldn't break this quickly. What could have happened?)
1000688220.korean: (어떻게 된 거지? 아자즈 씨가 설계해 주신 문인데, 이렇게 금방 고장 났을 리는 없어. 무슨 일이 벌어진 거지?)

1000688221.english: The boxes containing construction materials are missing too… and there's more than just a few things gone!
1000688221.korean: 건설 자재가 들어있던 상자도 안 보이고… 없어진 물건들이 한둘이 아니잖아?!

1000688223.english: (Wait, that shiny thing in the corner…)

1000688227.english: Wait a minute. You robbed the warehouse and got a medal?

1000688229.english: Of course I didn't get the medal for robbing the warehouse. This time, I really didn't do anything!
1000688229.korean: 당연히 창고를 털어서 훈장을 받은 게 아니지. 이번에는 진짜로 아무 것도 안 했어!

1000688230.english: C-33 Andvari was furious at first and came looking for me, but…
1000688230.korean: 안드바리도 처음에는 화가 머리 끝까지 나서 나를 찾아왔지만…

1000688231.english: She quickly realized something was strange.

1000688232.english: …I wish she had realized it a little sooner.

1000688234.english: Quickly confess where you hid the items, sis!
1000688234.korean: 물건을 어디 숨겼는지 빨리 자백하세요, 언니!

1000688235.english: I don't know why you're doing this, but maybe you'll confess if you stop pinching my cheeks…
1000688235.korean: 뭐 때문에 그러는지는 모르겠지만, 일단 볼 꼬집기는 멈춰줘야 자백을 하지 않을까…

1000688236.english: Alvis-ssi stole from the warehouse again!
1000688236.korean: 알비스 언니가 창고에서 또 도둑질을 했단 말이예요!

1000688239.english: …It doesn't seem like it was T-13 Alvis?

1000688240.english: Where would a thief who admits it even exist?
1000688240.korean: 자기가 했다고 하는 도둑이 어디 있겠어요.

1000688242.english: She really looks wronged… do you want to explain in detail?
1000688242.korean: 진짜 억울해 보이는데... 자세히 얘기라도 좀 해 볼래?

1000688243.english: First, when exactly did that incident happen?
1000688243.korean: 일단, 그 일이 언제 있던 일인지부터.

1000688244.english: Hmph! I anticipated you'd try to wiggle out of this, so I brought the warehouse access records.
1000688244.korean: 흥! 이렇게 오리발을 내밀 줄 알고, 창고 출입 기록을 가져왔어요.

1000688245.english: There are records of entry yesterday at 9:10 PM and again at 1:00 AM.
1000688245.korean: 어제 저녁 9시 10분, 그리고 새벽 1시에 출입한 기록이 있네요.

1000688246.english: And T-13 Alvis-ssi returned to the dorm at 1:30 AM, so there was plenty of time for the crime.
1000688246.korean: 그리고 알비스 언니는 새벽 1시 반에 숙소에 들어왔으니, 범행을 저지를 시간은 충분해요.

1000688247.english: Therefore, the culprit must be Alvis-ssi!

1000688248.english: Impressive… like a detective… but, huh?
1000688248.korean: 대단한데, 마치 탐정 같아… 그런데, 어라?

1000688249.english: Wait a minute, then T-13 Alvis isn't the culprit!

1000688251.english: Because Alvis was walking with me at that time and came back after buying ice cream. She wouldn't have had time to go to the warehouse.
1000688251.korean: 왜냐하면 알비스는 그 시간에 나랑 같이 산책하다가 아이스크림을 사서 들어왔거든. 창고로 갈 시간은 없었을 거야.

1000688252.english: Th-then… you're saying Alvis-ssi isn't the culprit?
1000688252.korean: 그, 그럼… 알비스 언니가 범인이 아니라고요?

1000688253.english: Hiiing, I told you I really didn't do it! Ugh, my cheeks hurt…
1000688253.korean: 히잉, 내가 진짜 아니라고 했잖아! 으으, 볼 아파…

1000688254.english: And! Even though I sometimes secretly ate chocolate bars, it was too much to accuse me without solid evidence!
1000688254.korean: 그리고! 내가 평소에 초코바를 몰래 빼먹긴 했지만, 확실한 증거도 없이 범인으로 몰아가는 건 너무했어!

1000688255.english: That's true, but if you had behaved properly, no one would have suspected you, right?
1000688255.korean: 그렇긴 하지만, 평소 행실을 바르게 했다면 의심받을 일도 없었겠지?

1000688258.english: Since chocolate bar wrappers were found at the crime scene and one box of chocolate bars was missing, I thought for sure it was you…
1000688258.korean: 범행 현장에서 초코바 포장지가 발견된 데다가, 초코바 상자도 하나 사라진 상태라서 분명 알비스 언니가 벌인 일이라고 생각했었는데…

1000688259.english: Hehe, then this time I'll generously accept your apology with, say, two, no, three chocolate bars…
1000688259.korean: 히힛, 그럼 이번에는 초코바 두 개, 아니, 세 개 정도로 관대하게 사과를 받아줄…

1000688260.english: …Wait a minute. The chocolate bar box disappeared?

1000688261.english: Th-That naughty thief! They stole T-13 Alvis' chocolate bar box!
1000688261.korean: 이, 이 나쁜 도둑 같으니! 알비스의 초코바 상자를 훔쳐갔어!

1000688262.english: Why is that your chocolate bar, though?!

1000688263.english: Ah, anyway! I just wanted to say that taking someone else's things without permission is bad!
1000688263.korean: 아, 아무튼! 물건을 허락도 없이 가져가는 건 나쁜 일이라는 말을 하려고 한 거야!

1000688264.english: Alvis, you're saying something like that… you really have to live a long life to see this world.
1000688264.korean: 알비스, 네가 그런 말을 하다니… 정말 세상 오래 살고 볼 일이구나.

1000688269.english: The culprit who broke into C-33 Andvari's warehouse—T-13 Alvis will catch them and punish them!
1000688269.korean: 안드바리의 창고를 털어간 범인, 알비스가 잡아서 혼내 줄 거야!

1000688270.english: It's time to show them the taste of T-13 Alvis' 9mm bullets!!
1000688270.korean: 알비스의 9mm 총알 맛을 보여 줄 시간이다!!

1000688271.english: Do we really need to investigate…? City Guard is probably handling it anyway…
1000688271.korean: 굳이 우리가 조사해야 할까…? 어차피 시티가드가 수사하고 있을 텐데…

1000688274.english: (If T-13 Alvis realizes the importance of managing supplies from this, maybe they'll stop sneaking into the warehouse as a prank…?)
1000688274.korean: (이 기회에 알비스가 물자 관리의 중요성을 깨닫는다면, 창고에 침입하는 장난을 치는 것도 그만두지 않을까…?)

1000688275.english: …Now that I think about it, it seems like a good idea!
1000688275.korean: …다시 생각해 보니, 좋은 생각인 것 같아!

1000688277.english: Yeah. Since there's nothing urgent right now, I'll guard the warehouse.
1000688277.korean: 응. 마침 지금 당장은 급한 일이 없으니까, 내가 창고 경비를 서 줄게.

1000688278.english: Meanwhile, T-13 Alvis and… C-33 Andvari can catch the culprit together. What do you think?
1000688278.korean: 그 동안 알비스랑… 안드바리가 같이 범인을 잡으면 되겠다. 어떻게 생각해?

1000688280.english: Let's go, C-33 Andvari! The two of us will catch the culprit! Before the City Guard finds them!
1000688280.korean: 가자, 안드바리! 우리 둘이 범인을 잡는 거야! 시티가드가 찾아내기 전에 먼저!

1000688281.english: The Valhalla Detective Squad is formed!

1000688283.english: C-33 Andvari, wait, come over here…

1000688284.english: Bheur-ssi, what are you thinking? Please tell me too.
1000688284.korean: 베라 언니, 무슨 생각을 하시는 거예요? 저한테도 좀 알려주세요.

1000688285.english: …Now that T-13 Alvis has acted like that, just trying to stop them won't make them give up easily. Right?
1000688285.korean: …알비스가 저렇게 나온 이상, 우리가 말린다고 해서 쉽게 그만두지는 않을 거야. 그렇지?

1000688287.english: In that case, it might be better for you, C-33 Andvari, to stay by T-13 Alvis' side to make sure they don't cause a huge mess while explaining the importance of supply management.
1000688287.korean: 그럴 바에는 차라리, 안드바리 네가 옆에서 알비스가 큰 사고를 치지 못하게 관리하면서 물자 관리의 중요성에 대해 설명해 주는 편이 좋지 않겠니?

1000688289.english: Yes, then… I'll do my best!

1000688290.english: …And that's how the investigation by C-33 Andvari and me began.

1000688292.english: I can't agree with personal punishment, though.
1000688292.korean: 사적 제재에는 찬성할 수 없지만 말이야.

1000688293.english: Even though I said that, I was planning to catch them and hand them over to the City Guard.
