1000688293.korean: 말은 그렇게 했지만 잡아서 시티가드에 넘길 생각이었다구.

1000688294.english: Anyway, once we started the investigation… it didn't go as smoothly as I thought.
1000688294.korean: 아무튼, 수사를 시작했는데… 생각보다 일이 그렇게 쉽게 풀리지는 않았어.

1000688298.english: Alright, then let's begin the suspect interviews.

1000688302.english: C-close? Who's close! We just kind of know each other, that's all!
1000688302.korean: 치, 친하긴 누가 친해! 그냥 알고 지내는 사이 정도지!

1000688303.english: And if being close makes you a suspect, then wouldn't Cocona and Aqua be suspects too?
1000688303.korean: 그리고 친하다고 다 용의자면 코코나 아쿠아도 용의자겠다.

1000688305.english: Ah, that's not the reason we called you! Let me explain!
1000688305.korean: 앗, 그런 이유 때문에 부른 게 아니에요! 제가 설명할게요!

1000688306.english: First, I'm sorry to bother you with something like this when you're busy, P/A-00 Griffon-Big Sis.
1000688306.korean: 일단 바쁘신데 이런 일로 귀찮게 해서 죄송합니다, 그리폰 언니.

1000688307.english: The reason we called you here isn't because we think you're the thief who broke into the warehouse, so I hope you won't feel too offended.
1000688307.korean: 지금 이렇게 모신 건 그리폰 언니가 창고를 턴 도둑이라고 생각해서 그런 게 아니니까, 너무 기분 나빠하지 않으셨으면 좋겠어요.

1000688308.english: To find the culprit, we're talking to the people who were on duty around the time of the incident.
1000688308.korean: 범인을 찾기 위해, 어제 저녁 시간대에 근무를 하셨던 분들께 이야기를 들어 보고 있는 거라서요.

1000688309.english: So please think of this as just a formal investigation.
1000688309.korean: 그러니까 그냥 형식적인 조사라고 생각해 주세요.

1000688310.english: …If that's all it is, fine. Go ahead, ask.
1000688310.korean: …그런 거라면야. 좋아, 어디 한 번 물어봐.

1000688311.english: What were you doing around the time of the incident?
1000688311.korean: 사건이 발생한 시간대에 뭘 하고 계셨죠?

1000688312.english: [c][00FF1A]At that time, I was on night patrol. A little past 1 o'clock, I finished the patrol and headed back to the dorm.[-][/c]
1000688312.korean: [c][00FF1A]난 그 시간대에는 야간 순찰을 하고 있었어. 1시가 좀 넘은 시간에 야간 순찰을 끝내고 숙소로 향했지.[-][/c]

1000688313.english: [c][00FF1A]If you check the airfield usage records, you'll see I'm not lying.[-][/c]
1000688313.korean: [c][00FF1A]비행장 사용 기록 조회하면 거짓말이 아니라는 걸 알 수 있을 걸.[-][/c]

1000688314.english: Hmm, I see. Then did you notice anything suspicious?
1000688314.korean: 흐음, 그렇군요. 그럼 뭔가 수상한 걸 보신 적이 있나요?

1000688316.english: [c][00FF1A]Ah, I think I did see a light from the warehouse at dawn.[-][/c]
1000688316.korean: [c][00FF1A]아, 새벽에 창고에서 불빛을 본 것 같긴 해.[-][/c]

1000688319.english: I see… thank you! I think that's all, you're free to go now.
1000688319.korean: 그렇군요… 감사합니다! 이만 가 보셔도 될 것 같아요.

1000688321.english: Yes. You don't have to worry.

1000688322.english: Geez, suddenly calling me a suspect gave me such a scare.

1000688323.english: Hehe, sorry about that, T-13 Alvis's fault.

1000688325.english: Y-you're not going to pinch my cheeks, are you?!

1000688326.english: I wouldn't do that, since you're not our Squad Leader. Instead…
1000688326.korean: 우리 전대장도 아닌데 그럴 수야 없지. 대신…

1000688330.english: Pfft, what's with that weird sound?

1000688331.english: Anyway, I'll be going now. I think I've told you everything I saw that day.
1000688331.korean: 아무튼, 난 이제 가 볼게. 그 날 있던 일에 대해서는 다 말한 것 같거든.

1000688334.english: Bye, Griffon-Big Sis! Sorry again for calling you a suspect! Next time T-13 Alvis will share some snacks with you!
1000688334.korean: 그리폰 언니 안녕! 용의자라고 해서 미안! 다음엔 알비스가 간식이라도 나눠줄게!

1000688335.english: Well then, shall we bring in the next person?

1000688337.english: Second suspect… no, witness, please come in!
1000688337.korean: 두번째 용의자… 아니, 참고인 들어와 주세요!

1000688338.english: …This one has done nothing. This one wishes to appoint a lawyer.
1000688338.korean: …첩은 아무 것도 안 했다. 변호사를 선임하고 싶구나.

1000688339.english: I haven't even asked you anything yet?!

1000688340.english: That may be true… but since I have a record, I can't help but feel nervous.
1000688340.korean: 그건 그렇지만… 아무래도 전과가 있는 몸이다 보니 긴장되는구나.

1000688341.english: While waiting outside, I unintentionally overheard some of the conversation inside.
1000688341.korean: 밖에서 기다리면서, 본의 아니게 안에서 나누던 이야기들을 좀 엿듣게 되었다.

1000688342.english: Weren't you asking what people were doing at that time and whether they noticed anything unusual, in order to find the culprit?
1000688342.korean: 범인을 찾기 위해 그 시간에 무엇을 하고 있었는지와, 뭔가 특이한 것을 발견했는지를 조사하고 있지 않더냐?

1000688343.english: To prove my innocence, I shall fully cooperate.
1000688343.korean: 첩의 결백함을 밝히기 위해 적극 협조하도록 하겠다.

1000688344.english: [c][00FF1A]First of all, I have a solid alibi. Because that day, I was serving as the Commander's secretary.[-][/c]
1000688344.korean: [c][00FF1A]일단, 첩에게는 확실한 알리바이가 있다. 왜냐하면 첩은 그 날 사령관의 비서 역할을 하고 있었으니까.[-][/c]

1000688345.english: Secretary? But the Commander isn't working right now…
1000688345.korean: 비서요? 하지만, 사령관님은 지금 업무를 안 하고 계신데…

1000688346.english: [c][00FF1A]Of course, at the moment the Commander is taking a break from paperwork, so a secretary isn't really needed…[-][/c]
1000688346.korean: [c][00FF1A]물론 지금은 사령관이 서류업무를 잠시 휴식중인 상황이기에 비서가 필요 없지만…[-][/c]

1000688347.english: [c][00FF1A]But in case of an emergency, someone should still be there to contact others, don't you think?[-][/c]
1000688347.korean: [c][00FF1A]돌발 사태가 벌어졌을 때 다른 이들에게 연락을 할 수는 있어야 하지 않겠느냐.[-][/c]

1000688348.english: [c][00FF1A]Though really… what kind of emergency would happen anyway?[-][/c]
1000688348.korean: [c][00FF1A]그러나 사실… 돌발 사태가 벌어질 일이 뭐가 있겠느냐?[-][/c]

1000688349.english: [c][00FF1A]So as a secretary, I didn't actually have much to do. Let's just say I was more like a conversation partner to the Commander, who was bored after having their command panel confiscated.[-][/c]
1000688349.korean: [c][00FF1A]그래서 비서라고는 해도, 할 일이 그리 많지는 않았다. 그냥 지휘 패널을 압수당해 심심해하는 사령관의 말동무나 해 주는 역할이라고 할까?[-][/c]

1000688350.english: Then even T-13 Alvis could do that!

1000688351.english: [c][00FF1A]Hehe, true. It's something anyone could do.[-][/c]
1000688351.korean: [c][00FF1A]후후, 맞다. 누구나 할 수 있는 일이지.[-][/c]

1000688352.english: [c][00FF1A]So that day, I spent the whole afternoon leisurely with the Commander, then when evening came, finished up the work and headed straight to the dorms.[-][/c]
1000688352.korean: [c][00FF1A]그래서 그 날은 낮 동안은 종일 사령관과 느긋하게 시간을 보내다가, 저녁 시간이 되어 업무를 종료하고 곧장 숙소로 향했다.[-][/c]

1000688353.english: [c][00FF1A]After that, I spent the rest of the day helping my sisters with their tasks.[-][/c]
1000688353.korean: [c][00FF1A]그리고 자매들의 업무를 도우며 남은 하루를 보냈지.[-][/c]

1000688354.english: [c][00FF1A]I handled things so perfectly that Sister Black Wyrm even praised me, saying they were only able to finish on time because I was there.[-][/c]
1000688354.korean: [c][00FF1A]어찌나 일처리가 완벽했는지, 첩이 있었기에 제 시간에 업무를 끝낼 수 있었다고 블랙 웜 언니에게 칭찬까지 받을 정도였다.[-][/c]

1000688355.english: [c][00FF1A]To give you the times: I parted ways with the Commander at six, and finished all the work by eight.[-][/c]
1000688355.korean: [c][00FF1A]시간도 말해주자면, 사령관과 헤어졌을 때가 여섯 시, 그리고 업무를 전부 끝냈을 때가 여덟 시였다.[-][/c]

1000688357.english: Then, during the time of the incident… you don't have an alibi?
1000688357.korean: 그러면 사건이 있던 시간에 알리바이가… 없는데요?

1000688360.english: Hirume… you're the one who stole T-13 Alvis's choco bars…?!
1000688360.korean: 히루메 언니가… 알비스의 초코바를 훔쳐먹은 범인…?!

1000688361.english: No, it wasn't T-13 Alvis's choco bars in the first place…

1000688362.english: Ah, wait! Just because there's no alibi doesn't mean she's definitely the culprit!
1000688362.korean: 아, 아니다! 알리바이가 없다고 해서 범인이라고 확신할 수는 없지 않느냐!

1000688363.english: This is, um… what really happened is…

1000688365.english: Y-yes! I was hiding behind the bench.
1000688365.korean: 네, 넵! 벤치 뒤에 숨어 있었어요.

1000688366.english: But, um… since we've been receiving all sorts of help from Miss Hachiko of Castling, weren't we meeting here like this to give her a gift in return?
1000688366.korean: 그런데 저희… 하치코 씨에게 평소 이런저런 도움을 많이 받아서, 보답삼아 선물을 드리려고 이렇게 따로 만나는 거잖아요?

1000688368.english: …But is there really a reason we have to meet secretly in such a dark place? It's not like we're doing anything bad…
1000688368.korean: …굳이 이렇게 어두운 곳에서 몰래 만나야 하는 이유가 있나요? 뭐 나쁜 짓 하는 것도 아닌데…

1000688369.english: What if the City Guard misunderstands?

1000688371.english: …Then why not just schedule a proper meeting?

1000688372.english: Originally, I was going to ask the Commander and borrow a meeting room, but since parting ways earlier, I haven't been able to find him.
1000688372.korean: 원래는 사령관에게 얘기해서 따로 회의실을 빌리려고 했으나, 바쁜 일이 있는지 아까 헤어진 뒤로 그이를 찾을 수가 없더구나.

1000688373.english: Th-then at least, couldn't we have met in the daytime?
1000688373.korean: 그, 그럼 하다못해 낮에 만나는 건 어떨까요?

1000688374.english: Meeting openly in broad daylight is no good—too many eyes in Orca.
1000688374.korean: 대낮에 당당하게 만나기에는 오르카에는 눈이 너무 많다.

1000688375.english: We want this to be a surprise gift, and if word gets back to her, that would ruin it, wouldn't it?
1000688375.korean: 깜짝 선물을 하려고 하는데, 본인에게 소식이 들어가면 낭패가 아니겠느냐?

1000688376.english: I suppose that's true… but even if Miss Hachiko of Castling found out, she'd still be happy.
1000688376.korean: 그 말씀이 맞기는 한데… 하치코 씨라면 소식을 듣게 되더라도 기뻐하실 텐데.

1000688377.english: …Yes, but wouldn't the joy be less than with a true surprise?
1000688377.korean: …그래도 깜짝 선물보다는 기쁨이 좀 덜하지 않겠느냐?

1000688378.english: I-I see… well, then I guess it can't be helped…
1000688378.korean: 그, 그런가요? 그러면 뭐 어쩔 수 없죠….

1000688379.english: So… when should we do it?

1000688380.english: As soon as the kitchen schedule frees up, we'll start.

1000688381.english: Since this is a brand-new dish, it's bound to take quite a bit of time.
1000688381.korean: 아무래도 기존에 없던 새로운 메뉴인 만큼, 시간이 꽤 걸릴 테니 말이다.

1000688382.english: Yes. Let's work hard for Miss Hachiko of Castling…
1000688382.korean: 네. 하치코 씨를 위해 힘내서 개발해 보자구요…

1000688383.english: A unique meat pie you can only find in Svalbard!
1000688383.korean: 스발바르 제도에서만 먹을 수 있는 유니크한 미트파이를!

1000688384.english: [c][00FF1A]…For that reason, I was away from 8 o'clock until late at night.[-][/c]
1000688384.korean: [c][00FF1A]…그런 연유로, 8시부터 늦은 밤까지 자리를 비웠던 것이다.[-][/c]

1000688385.english: [c][00FF1A]If you want to verify, you can ask Aurora later.[-][/c]

1000688388.english: I can't wait! Will we get to try it too later?
1000688388.korean: 기대된다! 나중에 우리도 먹어볼 수 있어?

1000688389.english: If the development succeeds, of course you'll be able to eat as much as you want.
1000688389.korean: 개발에 성공한다면 얼마든지 먹어볼 수 있지 않겠느냐.

1000688390.english: Anyway, I'd like you to keep this a secret from everyone else.
1000688390.korean: 아무튼, 다른 사람들에게 이 사실은 비밀로 해 주었으면 좋겠구나.

1000688391.english: Especially—this must absolutely never reach Hachiko of Castling's ears!
1000688391.korean: 특히 하치코의 귀에 절대 이 소식이 들어가면 안 된다!

1000688392.english: Yes, I'll definitely keep it secret…!

1000688393.english: I'll keep my mouth shut too!

1000688395.english: We'll need to submit a report to the Commander about this incident later, and in that case, we'd have to write about this…
1000688395.korean: 이번 사건에 관해서 나중에 사령관님께 보고서를 올려야 하는데, 그럴 경우 이 이야기를 보고서에 써야 할 텐데요…

1000688396.english: Hehe, there's no need to worry.

1000688397.english: [c][00FF1A]That day, after parting at six in the evening, I couldn't find him again—he must have been busy… but both the Commander and the head chef have already been informed. So don't worry.[-][/c]
1000688397.korean: [c][00FF1A]그 날은 바쁜 일이 있었는지, 오후 여섯 시에 헤어진 뒤로 그이를 찾을 수가 없었지만… 사령관이나 주방장도 다 보고받은 일이다. 그러니 걱정하지 말거라.[-][/c]

1000688398.english: Wait, are you even allowed to tell us that?
1000688398.korean: 잠깐만, 그거 우리한테 알려줘도 되는 거야?

1000688401.english: Hehe, who knows… maybe I should just give Hachiko of Castling a call?
1000688401.korean: 후후, 글쎄… 어쩔까. 하치코한테 연락이나 해 볼까?

1000688403.english: I'm kidding. The City Guard would never do something bad like that.
1000688403.korean: 농담이야. 시티가드가 그런 나쁜 짓을 저지를 리가 없잖아?

1000688404.english: You can confide your secrets in me anytime.

1000688405.english: Phew… you really scared me for a second…

1000688406.english: …Anyway, aside from that, we looked into everyone else too, but they all had alibis.
1000688406.korean: …아무튼, 그 외에도 다른 사람들을 조사해 봤지만, 전부 알리바이가 있었어.

1000688407.english: [c][00FF1A]Me, you say? Well, it's true that I was on night duty yesterday, but…[-][/c]
1000688407.korean: [c][00FF1A]저 말입니까? 물론 제가 어제 야간 근무를 했던 건 사실이지만…[-][/c]

1000688408.english: [c][00FF1A]At that time, I was transporting supplies with T-8W Valkyrie-sama for the construction of the dormitory.[-][/c]
1000688408.korean: [c][00FF1A]저는 그 때 발키리 님과 함께 숙소 건설에 쓰일 물자를 운반하고 있었답니다.[-][/c]

1000688409.english: So there's no way I could be the culprit!
1000688409.korean: 그러니 제가 범인일 가능성은 없는 것이죠!

1000688410.english: [c][00FF1A]Me? Oh, I was having a drink at Café Amour at the time.[-][/c]
1000688410.korean: [c][00FF1A]나? 나야 그 때 카페 아모르에서 한 잔 하고 있었지.[-][/c]

1000688411.english: I only went after finishing my patrol properly, so don't go reporting that to the Commander, alright?
1000688411.korean: 제대로 순찰 다 끝내고 마시던 거니까, 사령관한테 이르면 안 된다?

1000688412.english: As for what I was doing at that time?
1000688412.korean: 본녀가 그 시간대에 무엇을 하고 있었냐고요?

1000688413.english: [c][00FF1A]Ohoho! It's nothing to keep secret, so I'll tell you! At that moment, I was looking for some health-boosting turquoise for the Commander's well-being![-][/c]
1000688413.korean: [c][00FF1A]오호호! 비밀로 할 것도 아니니 말씀드리죠! 본녀는 그 당시, 사령관의 건강을 위해 몸에 좋은 터키석을 찾고 있었사와요![-][/c]

1000688414.english: Are you impressed by my thoughtful consideration? Ohohohot!

1000688415.english: …And so, C-33 Andvari and I eventually decided to ask for the Commander's help.
1000688415.korean: …그래서 안드바리랑 나는 결국 사령관님의 도움을 받기로 결정했지.

1000688416.english: A splendid choice, truly worthy of the White Beast of Jinzou. Her retainer couldn't work at the time and was writhing in boredom, so she surely helped gladly…
1000688416.korean: 역시 진조의 하얀 야수다운 훌륭한 선택이다. 권속은 당시 일을 할 수 없어 심심함에 몸부림치던 상황이니 기꺼이 도왔을 테고…

1000688417.english: And with her assistance, finding the culprit would have been much easier.
1000688417.korean: 권속의 도움을 받으면 범인을 찾는 것도 훨씬 쉬웠을 테니까.

1000688418.english: Talk about killing two birds with one stone—you got tuna and a chocolate bar!
1000688418.korean: 그야말로 참치도 먹고 초코바도 먹는 상황이구나!

1000688419.english: Exactly. The boss's detective skills are worth acknowledging.

1000688420.english: Would've been even better if you had gone to the City Guard, though.

1000688422.english: Just as you said, once we had the Commander's help, we quickly caught the culprit's tail!
1000688422.korean: 그 말대로, 사령관님의 도움을 받았더니 금방 범인의 꼬리를 잡을 수 있었어!

1000688424.english: The way any detective does—through the clues!

1000688426.english: Yeah. The decisive clue that contributed to revealing the true culprit's identity.
1000688426.korean: 응. 진범의 정체를 밝히는 데에 공헌한 결정적인 단서.

1000688428.english: It's been how long since Cardinal Armand took away my panel…

1000688429.english: - Forget it. Counting the time I've been separated from the panel will only make me feel more miserable.
1000688429.korean: - 그만두자. 패널과 헤어진 시간을 세어봐야 더욱 비참해질 뿐이니까.

1000688430.english: - I lay down on the bed and let out a sigh.
1000688430.korean: - 나는 침대에 누운 채 한숨을 푹 쉬었다.

1000688431.english: - Still, if there's one thing to be thankful for… it's that if I endure this boredom just a little longer, I'll be able to return to duty.
1000688431.korean: - 그래도 다행인 점이 하나 있다면… 이 지루함을 조금만 더 견디면 다시 업무로 복귀할 수 있다는 것이겠지.

1000688432.english: - …The problem is that enduring it is difficult.

1000688433.english: - While fighting off the creeping boredom and spending the tedious time, someone knocked on my door.
1000688433.korean: - 밀려오는 지루함과 싸우며 무료한 시간을 보내던 도중, 누군가 내 방의 문을 두드렸다.

1000688434.english: - From my experience, usually at times like this, something interesting is waiting for me. I jumped up from my seat and flung the door wide open. And then…
1000688434.korean: - 내 경험상, 보통 이럴 때는 재밌는 일이 나를 기다리고 있는 법. 나는 득달같이 자리에서 일어나 방 문을 열어젖혔다. 그리고…

1000688436.english: - Sweat trickled down my back. C-could it be that I'm about to be scolded for wasting resources last time?
1000688436.korean: - 등줄기를 타고 땀이 주르륵 흘러내렸다. 호, 혹시 저번에 자원을 낭비한 것 때문에 혼나는 건가?

1000688437.english: Huh? Oh, no, that's not it!

1000688438.english: Someone broke into the warehouse, so I've been working with T-13 Alvis to track down the culprit.
1000688438.korean: 창고에 누가 침입하는 일이 있었는데, 알비스 언니랑 같이 범인을 찾고 있었어요.

1000688439.english: That's right! T-13 Alvis is now the assistant of the Valhalla Detective Agency.
1000688439.korean: 맞아! 지금 알비스는 발할라 탐정단의 조수야.

1000688440.english: Yep, the great detective C-33 Andvari and her assistant T-13 Alvis make up our detective team.
1000688440.korean: 응, 명탐정 안드바리와 조수 알비스로 이루어진 탐정단이야.

1000688441.english: For the record, we've never once let a criminal slip away! Pretty amazing, huh?
1000688441.korean: 참고로 우린 여태까지 범인을 단 한 명도 놓친 적 없어! 어때, 대단하지?

1000688443.english: …But you haven't actually caught anyone yet.

1000688444.english: We're about to, so it's fine!

1000688446.english: We interviewed everyone who was on duty during the evening hours to find the culprit, but…
1000688446.korean: 범인을 찾기 위해 저녁 시간대에 근무하신 분들과 인터뷰를 해 봤는데…

1000688447.english: Everyone had an alibi at that time, and no one saw anything that could serve as a clue.
1000688447.korean: 다들 그 시간에 알리바이도 있고, 뭔가 단서가 될 만한 걸 보신 분도 없어요.

1000688448.english: The case has completely turned into a dead end…

1000688449.english: So, that's why I'd like to ask—could you perhaps help us find the culprit, Commander?
1000688449.korean: 그래서 드리는 말씀인데, 혹시… 저희가 범인을 찾는 걸 도와주실 수 있나요, 사령관님?

1000688450.english: - Well now… that's quite the nerve-racking request. Hunting down a criminal, huh…
1000688450.korean: - 이거 참… 꽤 긴장되는 요청인걸. 범인 찾기라니…

1000688452.english: Then let us show you the data we've gathered so far! Here!
1000688452.korean: 그럼 우리가 여태까지 조사한 자료를 보여줄게! 자!

1000688453.english: I began to examine the interview notes, written in C-33 Andvari's round handwriting.
1000688453.korean: - 나는 안드바리의 동글동글한 글씨체로 쓰여 있는 인터뷰 기록지를 살펴보기 시작했다.

1000688454.english: As I looked through the conversations C-33 Andvari had with the members, a sudden idea flashed across my mind.
1000688454.korean: - 안드바리가 대원들과 나눈 대화를 들여다보던 도중, 문득 좋은 아이디어가 뇌리를 스치고 지나갔다.

1000688455.english: What is it, Commander? Did you figure something out?
1000688455.korean: 왜 그래, 사령관님? 뭔가 알 것 같아?

1000688456.english: - Yes. With this, I can solve the problem completely…
1000688456.korean: - 그래. 이거라면 문제를 완벽하게 해결할 수 있겠어…

1000688458.english: The chocolate bar wrapper C-33 Andvari found in the warehouse…

1000688459.english: - That is the decisive clue to resolving this case.
1000688459.korean: - 그것이 이번 일을 해결할 결정적인 열쇠다.

1000688461.english: I came right away since I heard you were urgently looking for me.

1000688462.english: If that's what you wish, Commander, I'll answer anything.
1000688462.korean: 사령관님이 원하신다면 무엇이든 대답해 드릴 수 있죠.

1000688463.english: - I pulled out the chocolate bar wrapper.

1000688465.english: W-what do you mean by that?! My diet and weight management are perfect, I don't even snack on junk food!
1000688465.korean: 그, 그게 무슨 말씀이세요?! 저는 식단 조절도 체중 조절도 완벽해서, 군것질 같은 건 안 하는 몸이거든요?

1000688466.english: Uh, didn't you say before that T-10 Nymph Big Sis was on a diet?
1000688466.korean: 어, 전에 님프 언니 다이어트 한다고 하지 않았어?

1000688467.english: Ah, Alvis Big Sis! You're not supposed to say that!
1000688467.korean: 아, 알비스 언니! 그런 말 하면 안돼요!

1000688471.english: Ah, it's just that we found the warehouse door wide open. Some of the supplies were gone, and a few other items had disappeared as well…
1000688471.korean: 아, 다름이 아니고, 창고 문이 활짝 열린 채로 발견되었거든요. 창고에서 자원도 사라졌고, 그 밖에 다른 물건들도 없어진 상태길래…

1000688472.english: We need to figure out what happened.
1000688472.korean: 무슨 일이 있었는지 파악을 해야 할 것 같아서요.

1000688473.english: Right now, the only clue we have left is that chocolate bar wrapper, so we thought maybe you might know something about the incident, T-10 Nymph.
1000688473.korean: 지금 저희한테 남아있는 단서가 저 초코바 포장지 뿐이라서, 혹시나 님프 언니가 사건에 대해 알고 계실까 해서 여쭤본 거예요.

1000688474.english: Ah, if it was found in the warehouse, then that was probably mine.
1000688474.korean: 아, 창고에서 발견된 거면 제가 먹은 게 맞는 것 같네요.

1000688475.english: [c][00FF1A]Around 9 o'clock yesterday, I went into the warehouse to move a box of construction materials.[-][/c]
1000688475.korean: [c][00FF1A]어제 9시쯤에 건설용 자재가 든 상자를 옮기느라 창고에 들어갔거든요.[-][/c]

1000688476.english: [c][00FF1A]The box wasn't that big, but it was pretty heavy. So after Setting it down, I took a short break and ate a chocolate bar.[-][/c]
1000688476.korean: [c][00FF1A]상자 크기가 그렇게 큰 편은 아니었는데, 무게가 꽤 나갔어요. 그래서 상자를 내려놓고 잠시 쉬면서 초코바를 먹었었죠.[-][/c]

1000688478.english: Then the case hits a dead end again… our only clue is gone.
1000688478.korean: 그럼 사건이 또 미궁에 빠지네요… 유일한 단서였는데.

1000688482.english: Just wait a sec! I'll grab something from the dorms!
1000688482.korean: 잠깐만 기다려 줘, 알비스가 숙소에서 뭐 좀 가져올게!

1000688485.english: Ahaha, looks like she thought of something good.
1000688485.korean: 아하하, 뭔가 좋은 생각이 떠오른 모양이야.

1000688486.english: Ah, that's probably about T-8W Valkyrie.

1000688488.english: Yes. I spoke with her today, and she said she helped Alfred move construction materials in the warehouse early this morning.
1000688488.korean: 네, 오늘 이야기를 나눠봤는데, 새벽에 창고에서 건설 자재를 옮기던 알프레드님을 도와드렸다고 하셨거든요.

1000688489.english: I see… that matches what Alfred said. Wait, then…
1000688489.korean: 그렇구나… 알프레드님이 하신 말이랑 같네요. 어라? 그러면…

1000688490.english: …was there never an intruder in the warehouse at all?

1000688491.english: - With the recent influx of refugees, the Orca Resistance had suddenly grown in number.
1000688491.korean: - 최근 난민들의 합류로 인해 부쩍 늘어난 오르카 저항군.

1000688492.english: - Since our existing facilities couldn't house everyone, we decided to build additional barracks…
1000688492.korean: - 기존의 시설만으로는 그 사람들을 전부 수용할 수 없었기에, 우리는 숙소를 더 짓기로 했고…

1000688493.english: So the issue came from moving resources for the construction site.
1000688493.korean: 건설 현장에서 필요한 자원을 옮기는 과정에서 문제가 생긴 거였군요.

1000688494.english: That makes sense… Commander had their control panel confiscated only recently, after all.
1000688494.korean: 그렇겠네요… 사령관님이 지휘 패널을 압수당하신 건 얼마 안 된 일이니까.

1000688495.english: Some of you might not have heard yet. If we just call it a work-related mistake, it's understandable…
1000688495.korean: 아직 소식을 못 들으신 분도 계실 수 있겠어요. 업무상 발생한 착오라고 하면 이해도 되고…

1000688496.english: …Phew. So, it wasn't as big of a deal as we thought.
1000688496.korean: …휴. 그럼 생각보다 큰 일이 아니었던 거네요.

1000688498.english: But was it really not a big deal?

1000688499.english: There's something strange about this case!
1000688499.korean: 이 사건에는 한 가지 이상한 점이 있어!

1000688501.english: What are you talking about all of a sudden, T-13 Alvis?

1000688502.english: The diary that Ms. Alexandra of Resonance told me to keep…

1000688503.english: I wrote down my impressions of the chocolates and snacks I ate each day in there!
1000688503.korean: 알비스는 거기에 그 날 먹은 초콜릿이랑 간식들의 감상평을 적어놨거든!

1000688505.english: …Well, I didn't have anything else to write.

1000688507.english: How did the Commander immediately know that the chocolate bar wrapper meant it was T-10 Nymph who ate it?
1000688507.korean: 사령관님은 어떻게 초코바 포장지를 보자 마자 님프 언니가 먹은 거라는 사실을 알아냈냐는 거!

1000688508.english: [c][00FF1A]That doesn't sound too strange, does it? That chocolate was distributed in Valhalla…[-][/c]
1000688508.korean: [c][00FF1A]그건 그렇게 이상한 일이 아니잖아요? 이건 발할라에 배급된 초콜릿이니까…[-][/c]

1000688509.english: [c][00FF1A]True. But… the chocolate T-10 Nymph ate! That was only first distributed yesterday morning![-][/c]
1000688509.korean: [c][00FF1A]맞아. 하지만… 님프 언니가 먹은 초콜릿! 그게 배급되기 시작된 건 어제 아침이야![-][/c]

1000688512.english: The Commander isn't in a position to be handling duties right now, right? So how could the Commander possibly know that the chocolate bar was part of Valhalla's distribution?
1000688512.korean: 사령관님은 현재 업무를 보실 수 없는 상황이잖아요? 지금 사령관님이 그 초콜릿이 발할라에 보급된 초콜릿이라는 사실을 알고 계실 수가 없을 텐데…

1000688515.english: The culprit behind the warehouse break-in… was the Commander!
1000688515.korean: 창고 침입 사건의 범인은 바로… 사령관님이었어요!

1000688516.english: The culprit behind the warehouse incident…

1000688518.english: The Commander, the culprit? But wasn't this just a simple misunderstanding that turned into nothing serious?
1000688518.korean: 사령관님이 범인이라니요? 애초에 이번 일은 그냥 단순한 해프닝으로 끝난 거 아니었나요?

1000688519.english: That's what the Commander wanted us to think.
1000688519.korean: 그렇게 생각하도록 사령관님이 저희를 유도하신 거죠.

1000688520.english: If it weren't for T-13 Alvis's snack diary, I would've been fooled too.
1000688520.korean: 알비스 언니가 쓴 간식 일기가 아니었다면, 저도 속아넘어갈 뻔 했어요.

1000688521.english: …But doesn't it sound odd? The Commander sneaking into the warehouse?
